subject: THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_t=x6w92x2h_OkNceioxo6bani8wV6Q7dmQ0mivYjNUMGqqSJfw3rif-eonybZ1JM5m6JyDEP8n5vKi7xxquloOwCT7lFpekFFKFON4zA5Snbw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_t=x6w92x2h_OkNceioxo6bani8wV6Q7dmQ0mivYjNUMGqqSJfw3rif-eonybZ1JM5m6JyDEP8n5vKi7xxquloOwCT7lFpekFFKFON4zA5Snbw%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_e=86FI7bUvUcavOtBNkPqmKkYihyH9R6CiODq2-6f8RClDlFi8kZEEtyLMftuSgI6HgtzDT6BM9RCpez0oP-kXUKEG7w2D1XLdPXhjPsvpey1KVx7xJGPvtGu3-GKpsucyiH5QcjJWmw1Hgu9gWHWytdQhDArfNq8bOF7aQ5YQVt1EyIBw8srXnFxMJYj5j3vKVhPH9yWYe6TQ2gr_VYEBoY26zjVxe_WG30CKYy9tQ_fx0NZ_gB78VXpgHZ2jVtzAlqYKEE0HsWpZaqvHS5EGC52XcuZDxdjLsNJ7ChGQGkuNXh0vR9NC6FlHSnUYO-4cc7b68F-CidyVLYxvsRGEUVajqZ4DAC_7fjXCni6ihhd7HkuP30n0sbpaEX-INKir)
Hey Peter,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Peter: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_e=86FI7bUvUcavOtBNkPqmKkYihyH9R6CiODq2-6f8RClDlFi8kZEEtyLMftuSgI6HgtzDT6BM9RCpez0oP-kXUKEG7w2D1XLdPXhjPsvpey1KVx7xJGPvtGu3-GKpsucyiH5QcjJWmw1Hgu9gWHWytdQhDArfNq8bOF7aQ5YQVt1EyIBw8srXnFxMJYj5j3vKVhPH9yWYe6TQ2gr_VYEBoeuznF-HlGz7k1IZ-8AkJnxjNvsXqlQu9Ed7oQvp3TY960ndPyCp11FDIlkP6jHARgOjNE3DKGyx5UarjAcH9H_aHwKyanlVb2Tl_JFZHXuUKA1fKolMTmXvRBKSi1w74dj9wQ14_EVmEj7m1mxLNaP68v_FGeA-IjwDYORin-Wd)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_e=86FI7bUvUcavOtBNkPqmKkYihyH9R6CiODq2-6f8RClDlFi8kZEEtyLMftuSgI6HgtzDT6BM9RCpez0oP-kXUKEG7w2D1XLdPXhjPsvpey1KVx7xJGPvtGu3-GKpsucyiH5QcjJWmw1Hgu9gWHWytdQhDArfNq8bOF7aQ5YQVt1EyIBw8srXnFxMJYj5j3vKVhPH9yWYe6TQ2gr_VYEBoVxFLXMNjK3TQd1ACZuxzcJthqJV6YANB1-CE4yz56RgQsiYAnaIltkNokiXKAd9jlyB4k9WCH5yYR6f-pN0v-uCFBxcDV8FJmxEoWjqUKjR6C9KvhyG3rBg8_u52SDZLTBfuIGyQDuxjwR-S4uzMHzfbPJELoZEOVhhYrInfoQd)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_e=86FI7bUvUcavOtBNkPqmKkYihyH9R6CiODq2-6f8RClDlFi8kZEEtyLMftuSgI6HgtzDT6BM9RCpez0oP-kXUKEG7w2D1XLdPXhjPsvpey1KVx7xJGPvtGu3-GKpsucyiH5QcjJWmw1Hgu9gWHWytdQhDArfNq8bOF7aQ5YQVt1EyIBw8srXnFxMJYj5j3vKVhPH9yWYe6TQ2gr_VYEBoZYNXVm_yqW4VyDiYlqoOQj0Xpmeh4wueJirlvUvJlEQN4qp_UeXn5mEms8sVppW7a69D1RNsDsC4eWTSwE7Cik9BJztW29EjLQdNNfBak_fiqwlpm5wQHU2VdLufU7nPPF7earLzzU83L0_TOcbp3QV_NP-z2esmld1yolNd9i5)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_e=86FI7bUvUcavOtBNkPqmKkYihyH9R6CiODq2-6f8RClDlFi8kZEEtyLMftuSgI6HgtzDT6BM9RCpez0oP-kXUKEG7w2D1XLdPXhjPsvpey1KVx7xJGPvtGu3-GKpsucyiH5QcjJWmw1Hgu9gWHWytdQhDArfNq8bOF7aQ5YQVt1EyIBw8srXnFxMJYj5j3vKVhPH9yWYe6TQ2gr_VYEBoXQkiGfmahBLMtBvyWAUefCZSfLP8u0_akhu37rXQOLict4d-yFOQM7iTMW5SU-s2IveJrMYNNAbyVLW4ry92F5IPXclRSPD3BaVQvOcaalDjaoZ9mN9sOnKPPghXipnIT46ujiyYjEVh9qSabFl8Ka-iyQO0PqdT1DOy5BDebr0)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=611f34bb89df493f8f74dff19165e9d6&_e=86FI7bUvUcavOtBNkPqmKkYihyH9R6CiODq2-6f8RClDlFi8kZEEtyLMftuSgI6HgtzDT6BM9RCpez0oP-kXUKEG7w2D1XLdPXhjPsvpey1KVx7xJGPvtGu3-GKpsucyiH5QcjJWmw1Hgu9gWHWytdQhDArfNq8bOF7aQ5YQVt1EyIBw8srXnFxMJYj5j3vKVhPH9yWYe6TQ2gr_VYEBoVYJOH2N5fxrG0E9wjQCk2YdgcotunMjLRpXsJQuChU12twu_WTYL5Tjcy_TW1rWinPVNiJSBocyNDK0VEsL42ACaKH6I57IV4kzFM17N-FjAx7RJbadqCVuu76ZkqLoMnQ6VnJC5LEMEa71jPcFbbIx01KQ6jy44oDyXrlIzN-c)

[We need your help. body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_t=EBnZ9gtt55R0u2vEZJ9WPhHqRyY5D84Aofedj3y-XEiDyhF2Q90jheGzQ1mlDSpuyK-6orDB5YiTU338YWEhbAIr80ZQUFbpx25CKU_IPIA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_t=EBnZ9gtt55R0u2vEZJ9WPhHqRyY5D84Aofedj3y-XEiDyhF2Q90jheGzQ1mlDSpuyK-6orDB5YiTU338YWEhbAIr80ZQUFbpx25CKU_IPIA%3D)

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zYBaOqiD5IXHJbrvVFUSewkmXRUDAtjC7DlsgpiFoUKcjSTxy8g_CZbf1XLUsxkH1ZHbyHYFKE7NPg6Rc0ySKeRas83NZ_Dof--H7NKwA2Qz7FCvvux1wrltbNSbxMSPZBIBanKx_WHh5qNUXpyMscWwQsVhyYXXzOqjiECa747aFeP9TxAF95EOoHJ59Hina-jnZ0AgdqMN8UoMyTwXQExtaIdhz4LqS3OgBXVprIuThXpRTLakRALqaIlOJM8FrMmnAwbfO_f4kQs54vCo0HcfhyWxW7mYedHr8C_yCicVCDn2X_sLwpzSecARHeNeRNch3Wr_f72XW7FvcKnTkMxRdGC1qnFeiK3UX5JhfD8)
Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zYBaOqiD5IXHJbrvVFUSewkmXRUDAtjC7DlsgpiFoUKcjSTxy8g_CZbf1XLUsxkH1ZHbyHYFKE7NPg6Rc0ySKeRas83NZ_Dof--H7NKwA2Qz7FCvvux1wrltbNSbxMSPZBIBanKx_WHh5qNUXpyMscWwQsVhyYXXzOqjiECa747aFeP9TxAF95EOoHJ59Hina-jnZ0AgdqMN8UoMyTwXQEMsLeuCySzN5nzKBiIUibyuUqlvxl-UhUiu5RLbv17YMAx5lCRx6teDmhrn8as3gbc1KpctCcfzVzC0IZTEHoekAkZhV-Q4lbrD6zSiOXcGEkrs7DLvwbbyaO_H3VcfKUJm2YoJ9_QW3leNfLAEJtj)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zYBaOqiD5IXHJbrvVFUSewkmXRUDAtjC7DlsgpiFoUKcjSTxy8g_CZbf1XLUsxkH1ZHbyHYFKE7NPg6Rc0ySKeRas83NZ_Dof--H7NKwA2Qz7FCvvux1wrltbNSbxMSPZBIBanKx_WHh5qNUXpyMscWwQsVhyYXXzOqjiECa747aFeP9TxAF95EOoHJ59Hina-jnZ0AgdqMN8UoMyTwXQGgGhXWhUPJLL3vKG5y1kSes9U_qubKT5GE3skX46xT4FoP2AYgVv45VhWPGJV7qPSX83hPABUew2tZuCU1E_BTj6CqciHuKxE3fQIaYMbpeg6fcyqBvnK-co7qV0ujqS3xLSFIQlpv-T0-sssgg2GC)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zYBaOqiD5IXHJbrvVFUSewkmXRUDAtjC7DlsgpiFoUKcjSTxy8g_CZbf1XLUsxkH1ZHbyHYFKE7NPg6Rc0ySKeRas83NZ_Dof--H7NKwA2Qz7FCvvux1wrltbNSbxMSPZBIBanKx_WHh5qNUXpyMscWwQsVhyYXXzOqjiECa747aFeP9TxAF95EOoHJ59Hina-jnZ0AgdqMN8UoMyTwXQED3oLVxAybFoA-brpIO3pLYk1iRqC9w0gA38lLj2UKty7LK5HRmVQt8KPso1RfADN45_cUdJQqs8JjSQZ5Tvr9hqi2Kskqx-o6BVaYKC4RCEVFeXKjlQC9C-pEntVxah7EPbroWt0kzgZF7phEf9pu)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zYBaOqiD5IXHJbrvVFUSewkmXRUDAtjC7DlsgpiFoUKcjSTxy8g_CZbf1XLUsxkH1ZHbyHYFKE7NPg6Rc0ySKeRas83NZ_Dof--H7NKwA2Qz7FCvvux1wrltbNSbxMSPZBIBanKx_WHh5qNUXpyMscWwQsVhyYXXzOqjiECa747aFeP9TxAF95EOoHJ59Hina-jnZ0AgdqMN8UoMyTwXQGQcybuuik8iboPgFFGac_C9tu4lneWE-M_8YsELSt-l6lpxFjk7wjOw--PHYLsmQYGnxmto8Urud_DJPCUcczPAKzs1A3JLfVWAKQlCAlQ7QZXmVXmGx9CbHGdH3trKWo5tFC57WSSnrM3IrHPCGeK)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zYBaOqiD5IXHJbrvVFUSewkmXRUDAtjC7DlsgpiFoUKcjSTxy8g_CZbf1XLUsxkH1ZHbyHYFKE7NPg6Rc0ySKeRas83NZ_Dof--H7NKwA2Qz7FCvvux1wrltbNSbxMSPZBIBanKx_WHh5qNUXpyMscWwQsVhyYXXzOqjiECa747aFeP9TxAF95EOoHJ59Hina-jnZ0AgdqMN8UoMyTwXQFuq_wBcMj_3DzdC1lxMqb4k8ez_qtRc_JsicgelBLMvPCPvD_nMB4tx1_tStxSsyM-zjIFRlHyiW4R7QJHcZExbfZdwhd6Mbw_sxlrq6o_FDAI_Sd8B_pnsf_CBu3QKRBGpl3Sr-jbUyTR7Gr4Kvwx)

---

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6zThlLfnAF02FngmeWrrfks622vD5gsxS1A6V6aBXUxK9xMod7-5Sha64uRel9URlsiab4rUAdC-FWR-QcJf_J03DAXU5fGbc-thmYHdVVXzLc92_ckhV-Fb05CudoSLCIlX9LFfHtznIoa09S0YYrFOkvikfv6tGLOfehyBfc0JFWzLVR1OeLbQbFe29qeGtDrYJJ1LY0oBickVcqde5tg%3D)| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa6-F-yT5DjjtlLTbECU-9qKKV3Hx54tHJeSteqI0fRUUQKcysDirXTEGJvjCjZVhjmoG49QKxTEYfC3b3RjUZEc3YGEAK6WcpJgIenjtLqH4v2vtqXwKaumoivJpCM5mLPiKXvMF7oXoVpWS-U1ojC68dmsNI0pe3J3-1F_dVPXPg86NVKHdrhRY54UX6GDM3bg%3D%3D)| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=072fd37ef91f4ea18d0234e00e955c63&_e=6dZzg7q28e5zDbReUPGa67gSSSC5cY2Afdkdr9fxOtR-BLuTKa2cn4GoFipyM5eBFsaJ1pplXlVMnHohLi7tCtRUAklJdwGc_sJnJYsM-k5GqkLelEmN6Ai0opkwzHJkgE9isTo4vFtt5IaxyFTX70_cE6lcPouXP8-7nbAyJk7eJYpHlMq6ns38165dI6MJh2cnDkWudqO5r4pOZ1lj6mEyJT-0tQ51XZznHfh3VM8%3D)

subject: Sarah Palin just revealed the Democrats’ secret plan for 2024
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 03, 2023

Sarah Palin just
revealed the Democrats' secret plan for 2024
Both parties are figuring
out their strategies for the upcoming presidential election. But
the Democrats might have one that changes the game.

And Sarah Palin just revealed the
Democrats' secret plan for 2024.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Biden caught in one
disgusting act that he can't hide from anymore

President Biden is
desperate to increase his approval rating. But that's looking
highly unlikely after his administration's latest failure.
➞ Continue Reading

This top Republican
suffered a medical emergency on live television

Working in politics
can be a stressful job. But the stress might have proven too much
for this politician.
➞ Continue Reading

Chilling testimony sent the
White House into complete chaos

The clock is ticking
on Joe Biden's presidency. But now his time may be up.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba166a599a784493ad6a526635aba582&_e=g-xkwaWCBXmha2N72CYb6Gb8TEPHm3d2mJGGSycXUtZGNHjBSletQdcBA0xIFH8yLzCDsVBAnKURKlEhljygRPV32IYaI9CllHr7VtW1Pm5Nm191gg3tzrEqcvMh0zBSit7FBVX0sxEEwiLfy2L-NBNWA5xZsHqA6PI2Qs2harL3SiTFmYMR7edzsenNRsdAwHfxcQ5DpiYHhTxuXweRlJ9CwtzfZ8yL_APjPZR5iBbcbrnAynGS48iwYH93cv0IcvYKEiXwdGdbTI1JGh3_BUCPjAdiE8-BtKT7EoK0fvGfA4899g4PaF7MGRkvXPKrEFgNY7iQJUwRzcPUTc6le7ZvURiuXqGUtV9ZHeqNVUDV7aImWj9JFX8DjLP-6fryYmMWmENZ1YKTJoY43CfRanZVflNYMMNI3QNvbBX9AAM%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba166a599a784493ad6a526635aba582&_e=g-xkwaWCBXmha2N72CYb6Gb8TEPHm3d2mJGGSycXUtZGNHjBSletQdcBA0xIFH8yLzCDsVBAnKURKlEhljygRPV32IYaI9CllHr7VtW1Pm5Nm191gg3tzrEqcvMh0zBSit7FBVX0sxEEwiLfy2L-NBNWA5xZsHqA6PI2Qs2harL3SiTFmYMR7edzsenNRsdAwHfxcQ5DpiYHhTxuXweRlJ9CwtzfZ8yL_APjPZR5iBbcbrnAynGS48iwYH93cv0IcvYKEiXwdGdbTI1JGh3_BQFl7uA-6GyLM_CJ4TaJFmTvPbpT9Xj6xTI0hR3E89IM_KEiIq1Xh9c7WT2x290IzAkpJKfcTPfkjaMjHSFRwaJOgyRAclU7ftzw0UQZSt1jlb6fAWw9CcgxfZRfYB2dLz9_VZB9qROij-y1KQld3qo%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba166a599a784493ad6a526635aba582&_e=g-xkwaWCBXmha2N72CYb6Gb8TEPHm3d2mJGGSycXUtZGNHjBSletQdcBA0xIFH8yLzCDsVBAnKURKlEhljygRPV32IYaI9CllHr7VtW1Pm5Nm191gg3tzrEqcvMh0zBSit7FBVX0sxEEwiLfy2L-NBNWA5xZsHqA6PI2Qs2harL3SiTFmYMR7edzsenNRsdAwHfxcQ5DpiYHhTxuXweRlJ9CwtzfZ8yL_APjPZR5iBbcbrnAynGS48iwYH93cv0IcvYKEiXwdGdbTI1JGh3_BfeRuD6ENlmrf4zb4LLnEOwvUopQt9wOcqtCZ5q3ZMf0X_-zKqGmVJLzV87Ow2B2Azu-hkpKA1DOp0zCDAvHafbYRgK1k74Q1t8nhIF9N1DuFTi7bN8vb6Geo0JGeH-d_Jy3AouBS6YO56oHq1bzjfs%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba166a599a784493ad6a526635aba582&_e=g-xkwaWCBXmha2N72CYb6Gb8TEPHm3d2mJGGSycXUtZGNHjBSletQdcBA0xIFH8yLzCDsVBAnKURKlEhljygRPV32IYaI9CllHr7VtW1Pm5Nm191gg3tzrEqcvMh0zBSit7FBVX0sxEEwiLfy2L-NBNWA5xZsHqA6PI2Qs2harL3SiTFmYMR7edzsenNRsdAwHfxcQ5DpiYHhTxuXweRlJ9CwtzfZ8yL_APjPZR5iBbcbrnAynGS48iwYH93cv0IcvYKEiXwdGdbTI1JGh3_BR4c0WYwhFOIe1ZeO8jazo4SPY2vG7UCbu3H6-xO8edNwrH_HGKqdSl-loplH13Hc9rMV3N7ZGWZBIvPHL7OWbzud8l3VLk2J0GHodayH5401Vv3bQOkspQkJ8zU-wIZI9AEaRyVBqR1IxQGS_2pHyo%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba166a599a784493ad6a526635aba582&_e=g-xkwaWCBXmha2N72CYb6Gb8TEPHm3d2mJGGSycXUtZGNHjBSletQdcBA0xIFH8yLzCDsVBAnKURKlEhljygRPV32IYaI9CllHr7VtW1Pm5Nm191gg3tzrEqcvMh0zBSit7FBVX0sxEEwiLfy2L-NBNWA5xZsHqA6PI2Qs2harL3SiTFmYMR7edzsenNRsdAwHfxcQ5DpiYHhTxuXweRlJ9CwtzfZ8yL_APjPZR5iBbcbrnAynGS48iwYH93cv0IcvYKEiXwdGdbTI1JGh3_BRSGY42zk16EpUCfowv6Ul80sxl3R7paPF_f-gdF_e-c-b5Rk88YMAnm7lELAth_uU218EGgddvR1LEEI8DlAKSVv0R9QEAwlAay3MULStwyU0ClZb0-nFQOngnWOjvxBe4n9o4wOeGINpUEeCYoN34%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give
---

Peter,

I appreciate every single donor that’s given to my campaign.

In the Harris-Biden economy, I know how hard it is to make ends meet. That’s why it means so much to me when resources are donated to help push my campaign forward for our Great American Comeback.

My campaign rests in the hands of grassroots supporters. To show my appreciation for joining this campaign, my team has put together a special membership package:

With a donation of $47 or more, I want to send you an official Team DeSantis membership card to show off your place on this campaign

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef220839756657612a76f96c3df2043b781f55908ab774bf990c6b7855852ce4965d3d08a0d2065f14d132635459245055b0705a50880471388f9e

This card opens the door to all of the shows of appreciation I give to every one of my donors. Not only does this card signify your generosity and dedication to fighting for freedom, but it also carries with it a number of additional team benefits, such as:

Donor-exclusive merch releases, discounts, and promotions

Invitations to tele-townhalls

VIP media alerts and first access to campaign updates

Access to password-protected campaign content

Personalized videos for you to share your membership status with your social network

Exclusive meet & greet opportunities

A Team DeSantis email signature and digital badge

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef220839756657612a76f96c3df2043b781f55908ab774bf990c6b7855852ce4965d3d08a0d2065f14d132635459245055b0705a50880471388f9e
DONATE $47: GET YOUR NEW MEMBER PACKAGE

>From investor-exclusive special merchandise to tele-town halls and meet-and-greet opportunities with me and Casey, you’ll have a true insider look at how this campaign operates when you join my team.

I want you in this fight with me.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef220839756657612a76f96c3df2043b781f55908ab774bf990c6b7855852ce4965d3d08a0d2065f14d132635459245055b0705a50880471388f9e
JOIN MY TEAM TODAY

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef220839756657612a76f96c3df2043b781f55908ab774bf990c6b7855852ce4965d3d08a0d2065f14d132635459245055b0705a50880471388f9e

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef220889fe9eba4b5274b0ac3fae2692d0e44604859a406c15b559d3f546977a939a450ec6c06f4f147d81dbeba814a8ea03509c7a081514dc5f32
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef2208bedeb6fef1cabe9306089ca0341f4e625d7959951b0c02cfb11ef145e8e1a740a95044f1814474f3c00b96b5dd0af67808e46de804d23179
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=487f6e9f89ef220839756657612a76f96c3df2043b781f55908ab774bf990c6b7855852ce4965d3d08a0d2065f14d132635459245055b0705a50880471388f9e

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, I appreciate every single donor that’s given to my campaign. In the Harris-Biden economy, I know how hard it is to make ends meet. That’s why it means so much to me when resources are donated to help push my campaign forward for our Great American Comeback. My campaign rests in the hands of grassroots supporters. To show my appreciation for joining this campaign, my team has put together a special membership package: With a donation of $47 or more, I want to send you an official Team DeSantis membership card to show off your place on this campaign This card opens the door to all of the shows of appreciation I give to every one of my donors. Not only does this card signify your generosity and dedication to fighting for freedom, but it also carries with it a number of additional team benefits, such as: Donor-exclusive merch releases, discounts, and promotions Invitations to tele-townhalls VIP media alerts and first access to campaign updates Access to password-protected campaign content Personalized videos for you to share your membership status with your social network Exclusive meet & greet opportunities A Team DeSantis email signature and digital badge DONATE $47: GET YOUR NEW MEMBER PACKAGE From investor-exclusive special merchandise to tele-town halls and meet-and-greet opportunities with me and Casey, you’ll have a true insider look at how this campaign operates when you join my team. I want you in this fight with me. JOIN MY TEAM TODAY In Freedom, Ron DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity - Protecting the unborn - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state - Expanding education freedom - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities - Lowering prescription drug costs - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable - Creating a universal school choice program - Delivering record-breaking tax relief - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

Ryan Zinke

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu49vj8ek3bo5epi9mcjg3cbunc1fjollr97fck0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj6aoj1cth2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb7u62ssldqibgj9jv6fa588q8oln87aafb3a5b0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj6aoj1cth2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi42mja6l89br6tq2ca8hmhdi2b7mc2v4if04mj8_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj6aoj1cth2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zridv7di31j4mef7k9cegftrmbkk8sbrs8uojv2o_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj6aoj1cth2bs)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675412%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnXZNZTHPGxfPddguDlLwQ&sysid=1)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you’ve been with me from the start or this is the first time you’re hearing about me, I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it’s important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675413%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nyNPy7izt2zFbQ6Z0skXjg&sysid=1 "Once youâ€TMve
finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help
me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675412%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnXZNZTHPGxfPddguDlLwQ&sysid=1)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _“Don’t complain. Do something about it.” _

---
| | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675412%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnXZNZTHPGxfPddguDlLwQ&sysid=1)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick-me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675412%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnXZNZTHPGxfPddguDlLwQ&sysid=1)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675414%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FeWiR89EWN7JXx2krBmROg&sysid=1 "It would mean a lot to me
if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the
strength of my campaign post-debate. >> ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675425%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6oYlrqVMc%2fd%2bDQxjqmxInQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675426%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=diylOUxNKg8soq9CLeBMoA&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675427%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8LP5c2CvUL2q%2brGO4Vf%2bxA&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675428%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qbsy2auPaFchLBNrPKMgoQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675429%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QOMVlKuNp5utKyXaUfDKdA&sysid=1)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675420%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fNXQHglJWp8%2f8IZ3GFV%2bYw&sysid=1 " I need your help â€“
starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

Nikki Haley

---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675422%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=00MLsHGzfAF3iJPoOReXPg&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675423%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z1sTjn5a0ETRzlP7xyF5Ow&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675424%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dWfwqjlLBlzbKaF4Mth9tA&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7gpn9ueidcatekqcl6o958vji3bilecsobosef0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o72cdh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0qn2hou77ei960nlb0er19ablqvk80hrucbdgrg_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o72cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zse80h5n919bvijglo8qlnprlo8p9jpfiilvm2l0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o72cdh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zih2r9ghh4rvn0572adgju01mvgnjvv3pq7tgu6o_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o72cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zreucopl75usvqgm8e9v2po6lpmuj39arape0ppg_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o72cdh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z77og19bdra65pkap7h656bc7qcjijididnlerpg_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o72cdh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcnvrgqlnq4mdtu9qnjj15jr7l31r01c23jvrdi0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2p0ogpi7l86sg0755uiarc3mbg10gdl307lbpv8_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3uaa2vb7bpn8tio2ejnu4d090vq9t96sdh9vgq8_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs)**
| [CONTRIBUTE $1 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zufsqeg13di44o6blpj6b8om08nt98romjs1amfo_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2nhnrbdec7gjur901pg5gp6mdg7efmmp36urjc8_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0eg277vmjo25g05r25kp54ccn2gqvgv97j371g_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zubnnj05ch20ht3f2c708cdoq2ccfk29vda8kleo_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0lm9r7is69ieejb0dvuso8sda9iafjin6912uo_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctj61o76cdh2bs)

Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Your America
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z%2fK1mOuFk2i%2bS%2fyPZCq4%2fQ&sysid=1) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a ‘Reverse ATM’. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z%2fK1mOuFk2i%2bS%2fyPZCq4%2fQ&sysid=1) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’ And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971\. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** “My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short.” **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22092%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1351pvAzZ4Nkzcu0lmj6BQ&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mVin1mJ7HGgvnLYXxe3g5w&sysid=1)

President Biden is
desperate to increase his approval rating. But that's looking
highly unlikely after his administration's latest failure.

Working in politics
can be a stressful job. But the stress might have proven too much
for this politician.

US

political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

Ryan Zinke

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: In what order do the end-times events take place?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjQ2LTk2MTYxZDQyNzcwYzRhMzNiN2E2ZGY3MzExNTJjMTBhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDI1NjgifQ/-os5ernIhcHu5ii6rxkZkQ)
---
Hello Friend,Have you been watching what is going on in our world? Do you need help to encourage you in your faith and fortify your hope in these dark days?When anxiety over inflation, wars, and uncertainty strikes, you need hope immediately. That's why God has given you His Word. He doesn't want you to have to wait for the peace that comes from knowing He's in control of the future.God's Word says that he knows how the end will happen.. Jesus rules victoriously over evil, and you'll spend an eternity in glory - free from pain and suffering - in His presence. That is such good news!While we wait for that ending, perhaps you or someone you love might have questions about what is happening now in our world and how it fits in with what God says is coming. Those are legitimate questions, and God's Word has answers!I've written a book that outlines the end of your story. That ending is powerful and perfect. You won't be disappointed, and believe me, you won't want to change a thing. The name of my book is _Perfect Ending: Why Your Eternal Future Matters Today_.This book will help you face your tomorrows, not in fear, but in absolute confidence, to prepare you for the soon and certain return of Christ. As you read, you'll:
---
* Gain valuable insight into how future biblical events affect you in the here and now.
* Find the answers to the 10 most frequently asked questions about heaven.
* Discover how some of our government's policies are paving the way for the Antichrist.
* Come to understand the crucial, but often confusing and overwhelming subject of Bible prophecy.
* Understand the precise sequence and importance of prophetic events like the rapture, tribulation, and millennium.

---
_Perfect Ending_ will be mailed to you as a way of saying thanks for whatever donation you are able to give to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. And as an added bonus, we will include our informative Bible Prophecy Chart to help you visualize end-times events.
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjQ2LTk2MTYxZDQyNzcwYzRhMzNiN2E2ZGY3MzExNTJjMTBhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDI1NjgifQ/Ka9BVqHIA_7aPTNatf_gMg)
---
Both of these resources are yours when you give here: **[https://secure.ptv.org/perfect-ending-generous-gift](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjQ2LTk2MTYxZDQyNzcwYzRhMzNiN2E2ZGY3MzExNTJjMTBhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDI1NjgifQ/XiZXd1KSDFXEdMhHvRCppg)** Each day is one day closer to the day when Christ returns. Let's be watching and waiting - and learning all we can from God's Word about our role in the days ahead.Eagerly awaiting His return, Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z02g20tkd2o95l8ah678o0nor3ujbg1ds4h4kvm8_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm6o31cth2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2s6a85r50olt0q63t8kpgq2bg0jmor45fh3a7no_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm6o31cth2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhk3v93kn81uu4vfinod37sblt5sejjvq6qcghc0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm6o31cth2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | | "DONATE TODAY" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | "DONATE TODAY" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
