name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z7J7Shdnc3WNJ1RyGB8COw&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z7J7Shdnc3WNJ1RyGB8COw&sysid=1)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9oNTUQ7GpHIDGUb903zYUA&sysid=1)**

| **Final stage before digital money** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=285c56cbd28c4e9eb0baab5246d4238d&_e=rn2zn4HwXWBVAZeJRtmchz-3cVi76ef1z-gX2N22UK68TvQApsu1Lc-QW5VJ7KVz_lJhQLvwvPlEwkoS2Qh-eabchgLBqbXhC7ZR_LBbI_EG-mPO4MyD1Fn_hctCkqPD429hvoypMVSaIKu3YZ6qWYuLqek8eBCk-OPgTWe1GZ5NawHFfTQfaJ_NA8V0BUV21VG5fs5jKqjwvAm0Cz-cYHSX50vHS9FjSuuPB453Av4bnglMMlfUS0vnki11hTOawfNxwyNDZ3ejetGtFHW28b9sAVJYkcbjwzu1C6J0Twg%3D) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in July, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It's controversial, but Nomi's interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=285c56cbd28c4e9eb0baab5246d4238d&_e=rn2zn4HwXWBVAZeJRtmchz-3cVi76ef1z-gX2N22UK68TvQApsu1Lc-QW5VJ7KVz_lJhQLvwvPlEwkoS2Qh-eabchgLBqbXhC7ZR_LBbI_EG-mPO4MyD1Fn_hctCkqPD429hvoypMVSaIKu3YZ6qWelU_EQj534d3SCSZvcfxo_rsz3S9MYqtWFCbtS_2JrHq7hpjPejBlmMufxtwBxSF2hqn1mnXpWL84EOiCfcYUBl4Bszw32Ae--Bzjv4osJGXQSC-CxwLUTjJvZVdEGKgLcl-nEnPNyU4CNulPvbX6c%3D)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9512185333a4a78b965076b4d88d137&_e=IQtCz3WhAj8qDNB_GqyIie097dCQF7IM0QAABk56bLwXHE67saJDi1waZr2EAbmr6eyC75_jJ33yX_GQkoGmmVYlb43oO0OHkEDv83AMsRXoSg03VdhnUOpQTKlz2QKFHPDijrAoSBrzZZoRDFRNh-wLq4eQ1d9z5cgDeA5P1f3GMW7zH1gjF-UDN9lzx-Dzo26Xzmd-LPsliGzyoeG1GQm9D0c2gtn4QS-9PsZnd4OXmLkN1pIVejT_FgebKjZ4uoN8QoKKDxHMJQZfmTWW7hsiHzw1m9HlE6LLTRzBzwaEZJ4zR7XDR1WMdnl6qeWGl_6ZWem8JRqcoHNVfnAPRRq1bAOW-XTjkIfXclIwxoZfOS-pjjeCrapaHthfbrd6-bAGfSOqqC4CbhgrHnAqZ63C84_iKV0odpZnTR9ZgPJog6kbmZE1QSlj9935A3I74UYIQVHy_Q4q6uVG1Bv5-N50bzloxJLi7HNiHEV_M47_f2O1BaDlZGSKqOs7xOh_FzoHZFgupQgt9C9MDJ0TPm0JhwG1rZBQ_k_XUWo3bindzLNrS4OSZkri3IscTRyaMlSyRPZb5vnTgvvWdGtQUwlbqj0dCrZMBjya_IATC8qmPBuxMq1fUFiI2ysZaqlL)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9512185333a4a78b965076b4d88d137&_e=IQtCz3WhAj8qDNB_GqyIie097dCQF7IM0QAABk56bLwXHE67saJDi1waZr2EAbmr6eyC75_jJ33yX_GQkoGmmVYlb43oO0OHkEDv83AMsRXoSg03VdhnUOpQTKlz2QKFHPDijrAoSBrzZZoRDFRNh-wLq4eQ1d9z5cgDeA5P1f3GMW7zH1gjF-UDN9lzx-Dzo26Xzmd-LPsliGzyoeG1GQm9D0c2gtn4QS-9PsZnd4OXmLkN1pIVejT_FgebKjZ4uoN8QoKKDxHMJQZfmTWW7hsiHzw1m9HlE6LLTRzBzwaEZJ4zR7XDR1WMdnl6qeWGl_6ZWem8JRqcoHNVfnAPRRq1bAOW-XTjkIfXclIwxoZfOS-pjjeCrapaHthfbrd6-bAGfSOqqC4CbhgrHnAqZ63C84_iKV0odpZnTR9ZgPJog6kbmZE1QSlj9935A3I74UYIQVHy_Q4q6uVG1Bv5-N50bzloxJLi7HNiHEV_M47slPJsJwXRD5jzocCDuxhgczHYP77zZnjoa1lRdB8iLuBnPUbzcG8KEeQ7jSy6WYGALiJ4ijl9ykO_FxkVonagJXCIMLVbi11Rmay-IZ_QYMm1r5zDYMcD2wVv-pLd193mAidTlu7ylKFNZCuxNNrn "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9512185333a4a78b965076b4d88d137&_e=IQtCz3WhAj8qDNB_GqyIie097dCQF7IM0QAABk56bLwXHE67saJDi1waZr2EAbmr6eyC75_jJ33yX_GQkoGmmVYlb43oO0OHkEDv83AMsRXoSg03VdhnUOpQTKlz2QKFHPDijrAoSBrzZZoRDFRNh-wLq4eQ1d9z5cgDeA5P1f3GMW7zH1gjF-UDN9lzx-Dzo26Xzmd-LPsliGzyoeG1GQm9D0c2gtn4QS-9PsZnd4OXmLkN1pIVejT_FgebKjZ4uoN8QoKKDxHMJQZfmTWW7hsiHzw1m9HlE6LLTRzBzwaEZJ4zR7XDR1WMdnl6qeWGl_6ZWem8JRqcoHNVfnAPRRq1bAOW-XTjkIfXclIwxoZfOS-pjjeCrapaHthfbrd6-bAGfSOqqC4CbhgrHnAqZ63C84_iKV0odpZnTR9ZgPJog6kbmZE1QSlj9935A3I74UYIQVHy_Q4q6uVG1Bv5-N50bzloxJLi7HNiHEV_M462fgsg-DKVEkn4dkZ6BwToOqK8ALvTR4RNJo850jhcp80V567B15WkoiAI6LycdWXt7qgqIBglmP83SVCr-feZRn_yuORMd0OtYTQehKWQvpesXD4aALiFlBiqWLjkE9A8pSosMMbfYjmH5UgkIhrJ)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9512185333a4a78b965076b4d88d137&_e=IQtCz3WhAj8qDNB_GqyIie097dCQF7IM0QAABk56bLwXHE67saJDi1waZr2EAbmr6eyC75_jJ33yX_GQkoGmmVYlb43oO0OHkEDv83AMsRXoSg03VdhnUOpQTKlz2QKFHPDijrAoSBrzZZoRDFRNh-wLq4eQ1d9z5cgDeA5P1f3GMW7zH1gjF-UDN9lzx-Dzo26Xzmd-LPsliGzyoeG1GQm9D0c2gtn4QS-9PsZnd4OXmLkN1pIVejT_FgebKjZ4uoN8QoKKDxHMJQZfmTWW7hsiHzw1m9HlE6LLTRzBzwaEZJ4zR7XDR1WMdnl6qeWGl_6ZWem8JRqcoHNVfnAPRRq1bAOW-XTjkIfXclIwxoZfOS-pjjeCrapaHthfbrd6-bAGfSOqqC4CbhgrHnAqZ63C84_iKV0odpZnTR9ZgPJog6kbmZE1QSlj9935A3I74UYIQVHy_Q4q6uVG1Bv5-N50bzloxJLi7HNiHEV_M47Wq7jbx9J-72YE-2t1wqrsd-BoVIcdFwyaG4bZbtVs6aQ8sPAok-d8DQ1liJ1j4tWE5mh_X9McPS9zAOYwyEDOKs04QHbxnsF-loF_PELVZJJ1kDATNCCyz7EpASkSIWjF-bbIYiy5dnkK1wMU-O_c)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9661b0ee99744bd98575598d78ff2a7&_e=RVhAdewD6DPDIjIOwWeRc3e8rJDj-92pK6IIp0n5rSNQDQXKaEQsgPSl8bhnByP1CU9KShENB4dca6188g__5EtCE1RKNomgANT8020331hDD6Aw-rRXWfhNYZmdCVEF4Fe9LWLq8x_aq7BUKTWebvWyeBt56I2qd99FnOpIx4B-ICtFz0yA7IaCKAXazVNRUPcbqhCQZZQdYQThCyebZGVOqIPrIo-b04LPlx71CBy3IVgHjdjwVAyBUjEd_ENWqoFNpv8-P2m9WXkvFFsCzayys-vtlMS9NKej3xrBhxLOk8mXdg5zmfIfRo9liWdmSB7JPEwAbpB2kra5lfYNhtTlKYi-GNmlhmxvk9NGDlMdDheZlN_2pErPN5tJZJ0V7W8JwpNVFG4E0WttWxSCD0pAE8ZQs7eZh36KEB7fdikJvSqqqOhLyIifF1F0IMje)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9661b0ee99744bd98575598d78ff2a7&_e=RVhAdewD6DPDIjIOwWeRc3e8rJDj-92pK6IIp0n5rSNQDQXKaEQsgPSl8bhnByP1CU9KShENB4dca6188g__5EtCE1RKNomgANT8020331hDD6Aw-rRXWfhNYZmdCVEF4Fe9LWLq8x_aq7BUKTWebvWyeBt56I2qd99FnOpIx4B-ICtFz0yA7IaCKAXazVNRUPcbqhCQZZQdYQThCyebZGVOqIPrIo-b04LPlx71CBy3IVgHjdjwVAyBUjEd_ENWqoFNpv8-P2m9WXkvFFsCzbO2HTkkLZqhkTMS3GEUfDvJbUbk1j48EyTxTF59oAz-3LhC-zIdn1T0e8vJRCtrx1IS62BeA5lVaOTL-KXaWMEa63rtxzLFQllIL0WwbiSAOEMScBE65AnRuUox9E-zze-_YTBihRCwWEGJlNhz7yI-ZtCMFov9Wp3eIw512OsJ)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9661b0ee99744bd98575598d78ff2a7&_e=RVhAdewD6DPDIjIOwWeRc3e8rJDj-92pK6IIp0n5rSNQDQXKaEQsgPSl8bhnByP1CU9KShENB4dca6188g__5EtCE1RKNomgANT8020331hDD6Aw-rRXWfhNYZmdCVEF4Fe9LWLq8x_aq7BUKTWebvWyeBt56I2qd99FnOpIx4B-ICtFz0yA7IaCKAXazVNRUPcbqhCQZZQdYQThCyebZGVOqIPrIo-b04LPlx71CBy3IVgHjdjwVAyBUjEd_ENWqoFNpv8-P2m9WXkvFFsCzUpr2tbQaFWetnT1hs3eWOivQuP8gk7OcBUJGldibC5yoD-NLZw9mvAVu3AJD9TzHhiECsxPoH34cxW7zuh_z6JEkstRVqEUORAhA_z-xn0LnBb2io2nZbjFeJIcSAQbIn09eTRA0d6uduuGx3x_qt7djxU-mEC2bc5nlmIKTasJ)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9661b0ee99744bd98575598d78ff2a7&_e=RVhAdewD6DPDIjIOwWeRc3e8rJDj-92pK6IIp0n5rSNQDQXKaEQsgPSl8bhnByP1CU9KShENB4dca6188g__5EtCE1RKNomgANT8020331hDD6Aw-rRXWfhNYZmdCVEF4Fe9LWLq8x_aq7BUKTWebvWyeBt56I2qd99FnOpIx4B-ICtFz0yA7IaCKAXazVNRUPcbqhCQZZQdYQThCyebZGVOqIPrIo-b04LPlx71CBy3IVgHjdjwVAyBUjEd_ENWqoFNpv8-P2m9WXkvFFsCzUowA3jDG_MLqTvIkjKeBGYREJ2QaxeeQGbhQpj2zOyfVbmFH-26jLXDZiI-QGzC-XOEDWdGFbO3FOrcfn7L6kxTtjioFhdnfj-P0xg8j7YyaCECz7tsAP22-AY2icxi0DwkPXZXQNpAAz-Y9_7kE88MbZ_IMPf1llAT7Hn3tfhp).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd5hcma8bp1a2dskfu3b1lenevvgee90opmo1ukg_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z89q5kvpnq1db142kt4fto7gkunpo792khbmld48_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo0of1cq5omgvge64uosfnrul3pc9jbibtkumjs0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs)**

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg6ejlao8mfqrnkmu0bffsh5e70glj6idv2mkob8_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2hthg8qo5po7kas0elot6lmpt5o98n9b3jp2g0_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3bmsmhhv5o0nq2rhm0slvuvq7n5lg9d4p49pt1g_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z293qrd1j6murm15gecs5c5ndmnikc811vkbp4fo_rp22sh2s8i66p76ctgm9or4cdh2bs "DONATE TODAY")

body:
In this video, Millionaire investor Brad Thomas reveals

| Dear Reader, **[In this video,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b915091c79ca44138302cca6556c8c2d&_e=2OcbtOf944g4gmJ8jQVAiRKDD_sX2DC8Mo7tdLfgVRj5TC5IqdMApXGUPq3Gcgw_3O2SJiyErqqvYfR0SiIxtm0JeenkRlF1cDioZXj4IbhBmeOcFwdm4LkMuX-jC2DDiaAbWOm261p2DZanm-XE0AXvGVYy29siOVpWVaMjZqFiHBBFtFSDbribs6GcZ91OSHbcnrrwdEYBz_cv-KTTsulJOo5B1sQ9eiuz_F9UKv3aVL0uSWvGysYJlwVRPI_eAVgxlGuJMr0622AIPAbCG1EibBVbspGMhi-S5TfRkkE%3D)** Millionaire investor Brad Thomas reveals how you can collect royalty payments from one of America's top companies - Amazon - 8 times a year... To get enough money to live off of each year...depending on how much you invest. By collecting $1,000s... $10,000s...or more every year! name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWupKbUDKN

Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like
to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWupKbUDKN

Friend,

The
first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation
to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR
support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that
we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country.

If
you're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd
like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so
you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to
accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.

Here's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in
Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where
I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to
graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and
witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on
September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for
the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support
of SEAL Team 1.

Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of
prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of
Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my
wonderful wife, Casey.

As
Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction,
unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why,
in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance.
When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an
uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a
citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans.

Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself.
Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:

Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;

Ranks number one for new business formations;

Ranks number one for net in-migration;

Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;

Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the
national average and even lower than other large states like
California and New York;

Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;

Has NO state income tax;

Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I
have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep
red blueprint for freedom.

But
here's the problem, Friend.

Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical
ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get
pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let
Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to
murder Americans. This is NOT okay.

Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest
cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San
Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this
decline.

We
have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own
party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He
has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob.

These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly
impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American
Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my
wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the
balance. This election is not about me. It's about YOU and the
American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's
fraud.

Our
nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline.

That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while
Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four
years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things
as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous
policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the
decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country.

The
time to act is NOW.

Chip in to my campaign here

I
believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and
freedom is worth fighting for.

I
fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd
and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the
American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in
this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when
it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United
States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:

Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy
to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.

I
stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate
stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from
being your voice and your fighter. Please, join me in fighting
for the future-because freedom is always worth fighting for.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWupKbUDKN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=87db6648fae34f1186c6a6162d078729&_e=wHniiL8IN5Nn0uVIsmN6-V-p_k_g4EZuXPkI0_IY_6HhzCptGygWZhkR2B_0RgfmqdLVz864r5Z6iV5kQhQvkGer7cnv0Hw5nu8HIHBOmRVATOibc2Rd63FcVILtaHgaY1We3Fkp_Mt_Fkqxq0Cd1TX-KyHPU_cxVdL_BxHujZBhE-u5_DtG_Ws96ytElw-Vd2mSX8uzTWLd6Fr0S_PWIzdvs9xSXuYlfuJpT7dZoO0V5WllfQu5JFerM2JepHkYvWf8JlrhwPAGzxsm9Cnok6fX4qGy1NN-PzdlRFW-BGA3Qic67I68z3VC1sl4peXxnSo257OpegIm7obE-6or7NcbrbRkr7xuI9NZ0cU5JT0UMhdLknwjAnKA_Tkuvzva6wdG-GdNpMjfEXQu7bY2HLqipWVrO5aAFkn0MxZzYa0Oh4qiqECQ81IugbBZ4yt1caqBqtQfrgrVBnZcthNpqqSBie5ICS5XqOa4kCJKDdTrg-NDdFndYLEjgF4jguyJHuGOBnZr2fuLYTT4lU4sjsa6y_MZgTsX83859sCvKTuGlfKNpB20TZl4bglhYLH8DByA102mMlibMFtDPsuNxsiIRb0b4zYhm78Sx9-h9y3DmsfB7ywL85p__08Nk3_3YFWxk2QM5MfCNFPkGPRuAw%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc747788dd35457b9e9f53d023b5fb3f&_e=jANQrJdF4D6c880O_Iew1uoQc9fADo4EceypN22uGsc32fglleafGWKI4lnlqIwzO9EE1E54iEM-D4iUlz_LhuTnme2mVe8pnHKtdcisJBpvSCYHaouo8YWpe2obSIq1Zp3I8iho5YcYvvAx_yHtlXXEIagguvZgaohzGMoVzIvy9q7F3rjh_bdaOnCUy1vTwl7g5eRHjb8E-liRo8KfaDBCOC_8KR5seSWpgIFourdkodDJIV1Jtrk_1J0FAzHDxqyWK6wM2hddUxR4zGP7jjMGEeHn0FmcP0buKzvJ7Dvvb2xiFHxLqQW_w5NfZzIpmrhu6ZY-UncmW2RHLJPqyOplLVm-zEKW8xx18ALi_d5SpQX51qb7dX4Rw5Pp0Oq7qxA8PWsFBDl5CA0mEhAFIQHWJ7Yx0oKgxFexjgZNm1rJ7s0ZIfUj8JKtt6PjEGZx)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc747788dd35457b9e9f53d023b5fb3f&_e=jANQrJdF4D6c880O_Iew1uoQc9fADo4EceypN22uGsc32fglleafGWKI4lnlqIwzO9EE1E54iEM-D4iUlz_LhuTnme2mVe8pnHKtdcisJBpvSCYHaouo8YWpe2obSIq1Zp3I8iho5YcYvvAx_yHtlXXEIagguvZgaohzGMoVzIvy9q7F3rjh_bdaOnCUy1vTwl7g5eRHjb8E-liRo8KfaDBCOC_8KR5seSWpgIFourdkodDJIV1Jtrk_1J0FAzHDxqyWK6wM2hddUxR4zGP7jigblJ2keKYsKqAdc_ABCCuTEQy8qPwUzbN1So4f6YDHODKDiTlEXT1L7d_M8dhGbOF2g7a70R2F8gW4Ap6oJv2vWMUAtjYZic7IflcI8iqS_Yp7WI5_Vbc9TrnzZzsuH0z-JmmV3KUSWl5ExHkeOXBgbFzkRmvM4_56DGgIJiMw)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc747788dd35457b9e9f53d023b5fb3f&_e=jANQrJdF4D6c880O_Iew1uoQc9fADo4EceypN22uGsc32fglleafGWKI4lnlqIwzO9EE1E54iEM-D4iUlz_LhuTnme2mVe8pnHKtdcisJBpvSCYHaouo8YWpe2obSIq1Zp3I8iho5YcYvvAx_yHtlXXEIagguvZgaohzGMoVzIvy9q7F3rjh_bdaOnCUy1vTwl7g5eRHjb8E-liRo8KfaDBCOC_8KR5seSWpgIFourdkodDJIV1Jtrk_1J0FAzHDxqyWK6wM2hddUxR4zGP7jvE_Go7w7DtlmZxFxjYDuoTrIxs_qs0fLPF7SN3PzRHrfi-jaBet6qFUBmTyCZMAK1MWt6RgewE8yX1CxFZZr7-4awh51im18oyh0AM4uuByHcMAk4jFSdAdTx4m71cKx-qeDEZh9IZM7CqHOyBYJPWA6OVBUK5Qw3eZxUKQK7dn)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc747788dd35457b9e9f53d023b5fb3f&_e=jANQrJdF4D6c880O_Iew1uoQc9fADo4EceypN22uGsc32fglleafGWKI4lnlqIwzO9EE1E54iEM-D4iUlz_LhuTnme2mVe8pnHKtdcisJBpvSCYHaouo8YWpe2obSIq1Zp3I8iho5YcYvvAx_yHtlXXEIagguvZgaohzGMoVzIvy9q7F3rjh_bdaOnCUy1vTwl7g5eRHjb8E-liRo8KfaDBCOC_8KR5seSWpgIFourdkodDJIV1Jtrk_1J0FAzHDxqyWK6wM2hddUxR4zGP7jhxlmLr54Ty9dez1vbMl03htkyvgb1whUVsbsBZ5r_BkVoVrpP8KhpJwdB7oPvGQvpqpCH4OyxCf6sqY8nzhIuGdBX3KivHrCzsXlm9L5aPE2n8Qw2X2NzRp_FP_BiILzvNo-HhFyhL_yzYNsc4w2CyFOXAbbWqXtG8Knh0jdbFM).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop the EPA from approving toxic neonics for 15 more years
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963819?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **PROTECT POLLINATORS: Tell the EPA to ban BEE-KILLING pesticides instead of approving them for another 15 years! >> **[**Take action now! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963820?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Wild bee populations are already in freefall. The **Rusty-Patched bumblebee population has CRASHED by 87%, the American bumblebee by 89%, and the Western bumblebee by 93%** over the past two decades. We can’t afford 15 more years of toxic neonic pesticides pushing wild bees even _**closer to extinction, Friend.**_ There are two roads ahead: one where we do nothing and neonics continue to kill bees, and one where we send the EPA a clear message to protect pollinators. [**Please, Friend, send your message to the EPA now and help BAN neonics so they don’t continue to kill and injure pollinators!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963821?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***SIGNATURE GOAL: 237 more names from your state*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963822?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s not just bees that are in danger, Friend. Exposure to neonics has been linked to **birth defects** of the heart and brain as well as **hormone disruption**. But it’s not as easy to avoid these pesticides as you might think. They’re often found on the food you eat – and _**they can’t be washed off!**_
It’s past time the EPA ban neonics and protect pollinators. But the possibility of **15 MORE YEARS of toxic pesticides** is still on the table. [**Help SAVE bees and fight toxic pesticides by 11:59pm TONIGHT! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963823?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1963822?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1aa3906a9fae4202a73344eecb0104aa&_e=rp7j1gHQ4v79hnEUs5wjiiwJvMTj2TGBHcTh96RGDHb1I46wY6vZgX9D20iQ52rHkePXm4a5nTh4JtgnX8vHHQc_0NnoWZvFdSr5TKLVmQDKvxAThQLqrPtdi18b2zWkw3Z0F4Cz6mF2aCrBQ6sZhUJu5QrmGxF1jy2kBoJhkhIzFkuy7P6mMp1N539dtCgXF9Ame3q7pfBFAlMbHNkeRzrZvUdajXkAD4o3ADgqRHjtrNAJuJOHaGi5yGaIct-Mmd_E5BXjvTyuLWOzI8apKu5j-d2c341ShLwRaBJFxWWqqCrrPD04Lv2qWXKYeQK5QgMGcS1RnGv78BZIG-UCohUMJ6K4zfy7xzGl8oI_6aozTkCvJTjMv4jWmTG-SJ1Djvy3wDylvQfivIbXagbt1OMeLlmBv-2p4YeNCDjmX_U%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1aa3906a9fae4202a73344eecb0104aa&_e=rp7j1gHQ4v79hnEUs5wjiiwJvMTj2TGBHcTh96RGDHb1I46wY6vZgX9D20iQ52rHkePXm4a5nTh4JtgnX8vHHQc_0NnoWZvFdSr5TKLVmQDKvxAThQLqrPtdi18b2zWkw3Z0F4Cz6mF2aCrBQ6sZhUJu5QrmGxF1jy2kBoJhkhIzFkuy7P6mMp1N539dtCgXF9Ame3q7pfBFAlMbHNkeRzrZvUdajXkAD4o3ADgqRHjtrNAJuJOHaGi5yGaIct-Mmd_E5BXjvTyuLWOzI8apKhMWNKUNSyoC8hAVe5jbEGI3m028ILso4Y3gi7QEzEQOZQTjixQ3RpbvLbEPsSC__BKZRux3uVzi2onBGNvl9xS5z9G-VU9ln7lT6EnmW0loPP4gNxUH1CC5HdDFgc4ISw48T_7B_LcAUMsgjZgYO5g%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1aa3906a9fae4202a73344eecb0104aa&_e=rp7j1gHQ4v79hnEUs5wjiiwJvMTj2TGBHcTh96RGDHb1I46wY6vZgX9D20iQ52rHkePXm4a5nTh4JtgnX8vHHQc_0NnoWZvFdSr5TKLVmQDKvxAThQLqrPtdi18b2zWkw3Z0F4Cz6mF2aCrBQ6sZhUJu5QrmGxF1jy2kBoJhkhIzFkuy7P6mMp1N539dtCgXF9Ame3q7pfBFAlMbHNkeRzrZvUdajXkAD4o3ADgqRHjtrNAJuJOHaGi5yGaIct-Mmd_E5BXjvTyuLWOzI8apKr3styLifBtaabPSGl0VVKwAL3V0ylXXzqu9mxfqxS6HRucRYSd8RPJA0UhcJCcEAMvHR_-fD-9noQduGzDIjXpWRqGSpBWaddTdB6vJpspPWl8DqDs3AkKReUpM0qxVIeiz-zx4_fNW_Rkx52PKlD0%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1aa3906a9fae4202a73344eecb0104aa&_e=rp7j1gHQ4v79hnEUs5wjiiwJvMTj2TGBHcTh96RGDHb1I46wY6vZgX9D20iQ52rHkePXm4a5nTh4JtgnX8vHHQc_0NnoWZvFdSr5TKLVmQDKvxAThQLqrPtdi18b2zWkw3Z0F4Cz6mF2aCrBQ6sZhUJu5QrmGxF1jy2kBoJhkhIzFkuy7P6mMp1N539dtCgXF9Ame3q7pfBFAlMbHNkeRzrZvUdajXkAD4o3ADgqRHjtrNAJuJOHaGi5yGaIct-Mmd_E5BXjvTyuLWOzI8apKj3p3g5EL-CEQUz7GhP3KaFlgsHKIc6C5995gLUz4wPWByr8tFHgLsJuREWuEt4I224qAz2I-Rk8nZKzJYk6LM1iU6SKcjsqsX6a2N6CJBsC3mMzayCDd6qnXuw0KbUHkJz6Ebm2C53-4IVbcMNWthc%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1122e77efe0c445595ff5bf200d65800&_e=Aun9k62Hf2K97lUGxEcVdi1DeMKNmKf1D0jXHHymTKcJimIIZBVJMnhDbZSbQ8YyARFf42QIKdKzMf4bZVL_G67zSEzyfpHfmknGJVZ0KBQm-qL4aE8xHC9no44scZcH_KAWGccd0UtaOMLIMqI1uNob3s6w6sdqW30r8IPweot-EPsVqdBO1dJi-Z0NqvGRxishkFxaUH7ZV9E9tYT-MOs8PR1jsQhkLTJzkMzh9Mu7MEarySxcYhuuld0Ion-0WH6v0v1lLrMd8ogI6nc_w2WMQhKTqTZKCofAP2aLZ5YY6AAJnepvipxV0LHXh45_RObj47PgcfxbV5Gd-XWHSzFTeamFmxfCDvxYegvxFslqyRSMkTbwV5UzBIKKfjyV-Vf_QtcOf3rKeTYP73LATwrD5_I5fSRRGDOhTw0kyHIL9G6Zu4Y9U0eX7NG8c2Rk "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1122e77efe0c445595ff5bf200d65800&_e=Aun9k62Hf2K97lUGxEcVdi1DeMKNmKf1D0jXHHymTKcJimIIZBVJMnhDbZSbQ8YyARFf42QIKdKzMf4bZVL_G67zSEzyfpHfmknGJVZ0KBQm-qL4aE8xHC9no44scZcH_KAWGccd0UtaOMLIMqI1uNob3s6w6sdqW30r8IPweot-EPsVqdBO1dJi-Z0NqvGRxishkFxaUH7ZV9E9tYT-MOs8PR1jsQhkLTJzkMzh9Mu7MEarySxcYhuuld0Ion-0WH6v0v1lLrMd8ogI6nc_w2WMQhKTqTZKCofAP2aLZ5bCuQ6ZongNPcuLSRswAB1028O1Ivm6Hf1aVL_N0PCXyap88fQTWK2_7hc0_lTqVp0nDrg7RNQ6XVrpKfR4v2OURWfXNWBbQJifkspkwQW_cWS62rxB1KYYgjTBf1GL8TWUXwA1cU0jCoh_AA6Z-K0H "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---

subject: My opponent should not be allowed to serve in Congress...
body:
Defeating George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T528c5aa6-45e4-4283-b705-2312aa5225cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, it’s Anna Kaplan, the Democrat running against George Santos. My opponent should not be allowed to serve in Congress. If he were a Democrat, he would’ve been expelled by his own party. Unfortunately, Republican House Speaker Kevin McCarthy lacks integrity and refuses to expel him. McCarthy needs Santos to vote with the Republicans to hold onto their slim majority in Congress. Here’s the bottom line: The only way to kick Santos out of Congress is to defeat him at the polls. I plan on doing just that. [We have a real opportunity to flip New York’s 3rd District this election cycle. Santos has a low approval rating -- so please, pitch in $10 or more split with Blue Amp Action to help me flip the district and remove him from office. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72732698-6bd1-4213-9492-754750d24d1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58b5195e-b33d-4cfc-aff9-532f7b6f06af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Unlike Santos, I don’t need to lie to get elected. Please, help me restore honor and integrity to the U.S. Congress. Thanks for your support, Anna Kaplan

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T853768f3-d4e8-4974-80fb-bef0eeb47180/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter, Election Day may seem far off, but that doesn't mean we can spend these next few months sitting idly and twiddling our thumbs._**Republicans are certainly not.**_
Instead, far-right extremists are using these calmer months to ensure that _as many_ voter suppression laws as possible are in place by 2024. **And their efforts have not gone in vain: During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked more than 4.6 million people from voting. **
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote.

body:
The knives are out.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230903-1-15&t=1&akid=1107%2E734936%2EcCpYkZ)
You heard that right.
Kari Lake and Blake Masters are expected to go head to head for the GOP nomination in Arizona.
The knives are out. But remember who these people are:
Masters’ rhetoric has verged into outright anti-semtism. He called abortion “demonic”. His connections to conspiratorial, far-right tech billionaires in Silicon Valley are well documented.
Kari Lake is still pushing the same lies that led to an insurrection at the Capitol in 2021. Lies that cost people their lives and brought our democracy to the brink.
This isn’t just about winning anymore. This isn’t just about controlling the Senate. This is about saving our democracy.
[**So right now, I’m asking you to help me beat them. Chip in $3 to my campaign. $3 to stop Masters and Lake before they get even more power and influence. Can I count on you?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230903-1-15&t=2&akid=1107%2E734936%2EcCpYkZ)
