name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Republicans threaten civil war over Trump’s legal proceedings while Democrats call for gun safety measures … and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, September 3rd, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdJ3RiZrFUtRExJnxpDQb-ezSXt0qso0VlbQ_8HmnXJSUpWKpUZC7-6s6nxjscgHhBjsJiBBynZ48VI0QHu4-9GVW30csNPwqSYqECASs1B3O-ipgawrqMBBH1EKFv4AozRBQVu6AFUhY6YKbazUUcL3CY5kkYxcjImBYw17MPHuWMH20cp9umXf6VMj7Xc7WhV6Gz4fRXSEuU6ZHdT3pKnYiaJCmfLMEwNYmhwzhhpFshkI_QIjey4y6pCaO-3ctDJanMczHl8vKMyIxPpCza2k5oEauVqKwQdsI1ZXmoCXWbYKfX9rlpBLfa-Ju84ocGYunuPnBmdQs-aYvSoI4kSGD55fRaEk3IinkTpqHTWpdVemr49AcAWCwUjiiginao-QAoWN9t3remln63AKt2okM9yT_R8g49JAJ3XI_UWhliy9eIlAve4_jgVtUrcXcUdVkPTIXAr66nZbHg50ErITuXYERw3L6rbTKX3R7sjPdyQdHNV2SO31_D02um3bMMs/3za/V1Jto-T0TuGz7b--ujulqQ/h0/8i_gAr1k7rhvbalhoWRPbmXCKIOspGBwJ-f7mYyZjgQ)
---
1️⃣ **_Georgia:_ Republican state Senator suggests a “civil war” if Trump is convicted of his crimes against democracy **
In Georgia, far-right Republican state Senator Colton Moore warned that Trump’s trial could lead to civil war while [**calling for a special session to investigate and even impeach District Attorney Fani Willis →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbQBLvaCMpxlJC_ykyQC33ReoXRjbvGEbo2Bs8sC5wpgeiUnYs_biOYq5jLyy7JySLWcg_VcXI8xoJvCpPyfP07R-npcb1Ck9O5YE3nnPvvLtvxVnOpGBNkm3gcZvXaIGPRWmWdMB75ROjl81OYzT_onuhftrp_79tbqSFxnM70ACbbDWbkACJ5Ho88agw0SxTduVS52qBkd5QQqVqhVRvs1sA_mGNMG92_REW9uCq5tO0-T9eLRRJt3VXysN_ANjNK_mPLKAyu-V5_vSUxTrnxSBz79JUcRU0Wm-4pysGK4UQdJQzkiw6yI1IRupAQTHMaVu3jmkWVZlnzcn2QjuDtF9b7tsbosbE64UdH8GrHra0EweE0Uzg_GS4R0wBCz9m3l1FBslEHitsoiPQL2AGCfMqGk6CWSfyWy3vXyY6AqxvrW3mz-6UaGqb1oKfpKcorRZQ1VoPeKr8CeSG39kc0zZ0_ZH9V6-8N2whxPvfPNefpLqZKnUdnpwQm9XSuuLzaRblYIgLVBnF47bF_SoJ7peq8wh_6EgEK5MkvKXEaTSaqrBuoYX8d2XWEXbM17GBNriJpfyUlEkaSWU9mvyR4i_zfVt3IfDMmymG-hPkD2Zt-lg28e3id7uSzKL2KQbOGlFvcccOrmp3isBtW3__HE_ql364TbHMhBoWq8ALi51/3za/V1Jto-T0TuGz7b--ujulqQ/h1/wyjz3YGFzndeDwytS3jWsI8iZMbx5R7fZPbYAevY1uA)
2️⃣ **_Oklahoma:_ Democrats call for an investigation of the state superintendent **
In Oklahoma, Democrats are working to start an impeachment probe of the extremist state superintendent [**whose rhetoric and personal attacks on teachers and school districts have led to bomb threats across the state →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEvBrroImTsrPwD3k3T4tQ7J5NYFvM3kvh6KwYxmxFrGOsW3xaMEROf5FWFF50gxc-Bpz6dT3-e523gcVoA1RMnlMr_cizLfFWpwlcXWPa6xFIwNdTG4viQxct9xFYX0JxtYoFmcI123EX_LyRUTi01t_5B1istkx4Unymx44XZkaj9RcndZrum1ujuQdbFMHlFwY03W_lZtgDWNA7TD_fxXmD0qw1C6LO5cICGQXl_--1Me4rR-wwDZpbnDFI_Dq9p7anfWoymi9C9qYgoF6WhuJ4BcfolzzrsxwjgFL3cMxVgpuj1bb9IcaIHMCXwRNKD6cSMBLmqe0Lg8f3SvpgQxJfX4ilbotsYRNyNOqXWCHIjYUeIqKiZKDiLFL43diF4uJuR_6mVMnxtwFvrVRKCDpKFWY_n12dk04i9qoq2WuS1GM1g-GRM8Gw2TJT3f072UjqLcs-zsM76swsQLuko8m66gPfG-K0pe1PGuZipAuQwgpkpQ9TZ93htBrOVG_VemOVKZtcOIzNjA4suQYn_COx7kr58UQwxOHfHGe1gBgy4TLiQNjvrhGGKH2ck0_KTY5fHH4GNz8bW0aL0ajwKlYEiVJQCi9JlS2gjEhlz1aSb27fQenCovMSnytJWcIujJLgofIl0O7z6hg3P6hpuNwe8UhjQhoKOJ8JQxXs9e2A9b23CmmVG-fhK-VTxfUgDVG9mesjsm4Yf6MxRGwH0/3za/V1Jto-T0TuGz7b--ujulqQ/h2/ew508DHHLnFbitzU_nvXgRprdS0xbPMuidYzP3OZr5A)
3️⃣ **_Tennessee:_ An unproductive special session comes to a close**
In Tennessee, a special session called to address public safety ended with no progress on gun safety reform following the worst school shooting in state history. [**Republicans continue to put lobbying interests ahead of the safety and well-being of their communities →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLwm3FVztl-m6DhTo8mWdNq5N_WscVWhcZaCROIPcCi68awf23OMZNmSfBgs9-6oMRNegylX6022ix3mp5nIo6xmSEHjtmBjbVEzaH6kkLIY93eoZb1r29h8UURLabtyz1j4jY7dcAcnJ0qzPqgi-GnTZAn81Kzj04V-MS1YpKXxRfsY_AUrjmD_QWUh_B8MHz4wM7x6-sNZJ8OZXZnZ9ROeFBdK3jTgVPWOlQQWwb8BGEYiyp0MvkNvfkFirkuZT1HYpkrEctk5t6gg1Iv10wg1RbgmvyGFojdwMe7WRU9dIyvQ0rjytBUuV-LMHWAYa-sHf9iAobcjpQbbv-QWfoROrafckxsUHCAeB0LNNgLqumlvBGBQIThOQc5eKqcrjg4A5J8sQprcl0nnOEPB-8Djwc0bs_ZK-xonze2vnOVkXDb3fotVBtOcJuGAA_L_OguRG1aZTIFh3KBXzBopxJ0g8GOYqoTIFSMobN94esr5cNOrfFj-Yll227nG4dwvTbMehH567JhE4QCRNLxDIv8VeaBorbL7-njJbnd5mRuddpGmCvATErSWdy9_5NjhnwPuqKFq9uVKjASQk92hyDxbRPYpHA0Xfe5XADhWzUtwxfx3oLQcc3OduRsLYpCIDt54UvwGz82GBUF7EdDfWUQrp7tWssXvls-rNltcdtvkf0mT_heyGyqC8T783rov1FrR-OmcgCw1tE-KUMY1G2EbBph4rFjDLF7BY2cYhAGlZYi_p6OVCSycbRsfDbnqXQ/3za/V1Jto-T0TuGz7b--ujulqQ/h3/RQiRaoxqwhTLrWuBZyVHOHROMAFnqRJcuT6Ya9dqwIc)
4️⃣ **_Read:_ Gabby Giffords’ op-ed about gun violence and protecting Virginia’s progress **
Gabby Giffords outlines the importance of common sense gun safety legislation and reflects on her experiences with gun violence in her recent op-ed. I’ve already told you about the radical Democrats who’ve pledged to file endless lawsuits to try and keep me off the 2024 ballot.

In the great state of New Hampshire – _home to the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION PRIMARY_ – these traitorous “Republicans” are now attempting to CANCEL OUT _YOUR_ VOTE!

---
**They’ve just filed a lawsuit to try and force us off the _*primary*_ ballot and sabotage our grassroots campaign.**

---
But it doesn’t end there...

---
_They’ve openly admitted that their goal is to “[target] the key electoral votes to deny Trump any path to 270.”_

---
Patriot, when I tell you that I will **_NEVER_ _SURRENDER_** our country to tyranny, I’m not just talking about Crooked Joe and the Third World Marxists who are trying to **JAIL** their leading political opponent for _LIFE_ ...

---
...I’m also talking about the backstabbing RINOs who would happily erase YOUR vote in the name of nominating a Deep State-approved puppet and _**HELPING**_ Crooked Joe win another 4 years.

---
_But just like the radical Left, these cowardly RINOs have underestimated our resolve every step of the way._

clean_body: They’re trying to force us off the ballot!| | | | | Patriot, I’ve already told you about the radical Democrats who’ve pledged to file endless lawsuits to try and keep me off the 2024 ballot. But the RINOs have also been hatching an equally sinister plot in the shadows... In the great state of New Hampshire – home to the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION PRIMARY – these traitorous “Republicans” are now attempting to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE! They’ve just filed a lawsuit to try and force us off the primary ballot and sabotage our grassroots campaign. But it doesn’t end there... They’ve openly admitted that their goal is to “[target] the key electoral votes to deny Trump any path to 270.” Patriot, when I tell you that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny, I’m not just talking about Crooked Joe and the Third World Marxists who are trying to JAIL their leading political opponent for LIFE ... ...I’m also talking about the backstabbing RINOs who would happily erase YOUR vote in the name of nominating a Deep State-approved puppet and HELPING Crooked Joe win another 4 years. But just like the radical Left, these cowardly RINOs have underestimated our resolve every step of the way. And now, we have the chance to show them that we will NEVER let them get away with this despicable plot! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | Support LG! 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e7233084ac&e=84ee529f47)
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5179cbe085&e=84ee529f47)
Dear Patriot,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3b24aa8b5a&e=84ee529f47)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ab5742d312&e=84ee529f47)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=159ab1be3f&e=84ee529f47)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Patriot, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=8ed371f564&e=84ee529f47)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=a853e2738c&e=84ee529f47)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Patriot, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=80af713a5c&e=84ee529f47)**.

subject: It only takes SIX!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James P
body:
Adam Schiff is so beatable | | | | | Copy of Copy of Copy of Copy of New message | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=73d1f4c009&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | | My Fellow American,
Adam Schiff is going to be the Democrat nominee for Senator from Califronia. There is no doubt about it.
Now, the only question is will his opponent in the general election be a Repbulican or another Democrat.
Our jungle primary system could result in TWO Democrats running against one another for this seat. **I AM REACHING OUT TO YOU TODAY BEACUSE I DESPERATELY NEED YOUR HELP TO STOP THAT FROM HAPPENING!**
---
[DONATE $6 TO DEFEAT ADAM SCHIFF!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=55b2c86101&e=84ee529f47)
| | | I ran for the Senate in 2018 and received the support of over 500,000 Californians despite joining the Senate primary just five weeks before the actual election. **We did that on less than $5,000!**
Now, as polling shows, we are the ONLY Republican that has a chance to make it to the general election and actuall beat Schiff **BUT** that only can happen if we hit our goal in the next 48 hours.
I'm looking for some major endorsements to help us get to the next level in this race - and they've made it very clear - they want me to have at least 25,000 individual donors to my campaign before they even CONSIDER supporting.
**WE NEED TO DO THAT AND DO IT FAST!** I'm asking you to donate just SIX dollars to my campaign - that's basically the price of a coffee at Starbucks.
**SIX DOLLARS** to defeat Adam Schiff - and that six dollars will go further than you can possibly imagine!

---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2b88e8d0c0&e=84ee529f47)
| | I'm a Coast Guard Veteran. I'm an America First conservative. I'm also a guy that knows how to relate to people from all parties and walks of life.
**I am going to deliver a victory in this Senate race if you can just help me get past these other candidates and get Pencil Neck Schiff into a general election.**
I'm reaching out to you because I **KNOW** you are a patriot and have helped Republicans make it over the line before. **Now, I'm asking you humbly to help me.**
[Can you spare just six dollars TODAY to help me defeat Adam Schiff?](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=42eb6cc064&e=84ee529f47)
And, once you've made your donation**forward this email to SIX more people so that they can also donate to Adam Schiff.** I need your help to get to the point where we can show our 25,000 individual donors -- can I count on you today?
Sincerely,
James P. Bradley

Now, as polling shows, we are the ONLY Republican that has a chance to make it to the general election and actuall beat Schiff BUT that only can happen if we hit our goal in the next 48 hours. I'm looking for some major endorsements to help us get to the next level in this race - and they've made it very clear - they want me to have at least 25,000 individual donors to my campaign before they even CONSIDER supporting. WE NEED TO DO THAT AND DO IT FAST! I'm asking you to donate just SIX dollars to my campaign - that's basically the price of a coffee at Starbucks. SIX DOLLARS to defeat Adam Schiff - and that six dollars will go further than you can possibly imagine! | | I'm a Coast Guard Veteran. I'm an America First conservative. I'm also a guy that knows how to relate to people from all parties and walks of life. I am going to deliver a victory in this Senate race if you can just help me get past these other candidates and get Pencil Neck Schiff into a general election. I'm reaching out to you because I KNOW you are a patriot and have helped Republicans make it over the line before. Now, I'm asking you humbly to help me. And, once you've made your donationforward this email to SIX more people so that they can also donate to Adam Schiff. I need your help to get to the point where we can show our 25,000 individual donors -- can I count on you today? Sincerely, James P. Bradley Paid for by James P. Bradley for US Senate

Ted Cruz Appears to Endorse Plowing Into Climate Protesters With Cars
Ted Cruz seemingly endorsed using trucks to plow into peaceful protesters when he shared a video of law enforcement doing exactly that.
Here’s what happened: Protesters set up a blockade on the road to Burning Man to demand the festival ban the use of private jets and single-use plastics. Videos showed a police ranger driving a pickup truck into the blockade, knocking one person out of the way.
Cruz retweeted the video, writing, “Play stupid games, win stupid prizes.”
It’s insane to think that a U.S. Senator would support law enforcement PLOWING into a peaceful protest, but that’s exactly what Ted Cruz has done.
He needs to be held accountable – and we can do that by DEFEATING him at the ballot box come November.
We’re supporting Roland Gutierrez, the TX State Senator running against him. Will you pitch in $25 or more before midnight to help Roland reach his fundraising goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4281087c1a24aa48dbea4c5d7169bb7&_e=Ryw4ohir8c7uyha2LjbVR82dr_99WFSalBYcCUUSETVkbGziK8C3BoEHJah0hmb2m4MO3paXUS5SU3_DvCuSRIgA9Oa1JD7I470hfeIsONQJ-ASFIptw3tI5qAYpigB38Iwrs0bwkh7vkZbxpH94g7aSgyKjfOra5p-O1ksCuJIAzv-KCRXtEi__Q84AsZ-GcqZq7ajwAhNhpJ5RAjwaTAFvuV1ojSabVlU5gzWrGPRYMaTXWMMp67hxA1MYbLKxkRWtOcOt_R40m0h7v36r2hlc5EGz-U774fMhuETZ7A4%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4281087c1a24aa48dbea4c5d7169bb7&_e=Ryw4ohir8c7uyha2LjbVR82dr_99WFSalBYcCUUSETVkbGziK8C3BoEHJah0hmb2m4MO3paXUS5SU3_DvCuSRIgA9Oa1JD7I470hfeIsONQJ-ASFIptw3tI5qAYpigB38Iwrs0bwkh7vkZbxpH94g7qNs21QX2BJ5MZCUhEepZRvsSoHW51Kk2EBiEABZKEiTrTO6wcTgmchEF-LR1Jcbvkj_mlgI7-L82JCmNshWvIjpf1tr98KTlqjLRhJxub2RBIrHT9RUwUOvjlPaxtG5vtjjvce3m4NMAe7mlsDOPc%3D) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4281087c1a24aa48dbea4c5d7169bb7&_e=Ryw4ohir8c7uyha2LjbVR82dr_99WFSalBYcCUUSETVkbGziK8C3BoEHJah0hmb2m4MO3paXUS5SU3_DvCuSRIgA9Oa1JD7I470hfeIsONQJ-ASFIptw3tI5qAYpigB38Iwrs0bwkh7vkZbxpH94g9xtjsYjuU1k1QALoCVxwqZ-lMkGPJxXV13SzeOcTf_lFmXJSNr3JXmJsA85ruOf1r-VRi3dipq912Z_yP41GO889SlDQ2npzNjV0NrTMgMgvrO9ghkWS0zvO_UgEwjgxIolyC1MCM0IF2LjcQoKsCA%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4281087c1a24aa48dbea4c5d7169bb7&_e=Ryw4ohir8c7uyha2LjbVR82dr_99WFSalBYcCUUSETVkbGziK8C3BoEHJah0hmb2m4MO3paXUS5SU3_DvCuSRIgA9Oa1JD7I470hfeIsONQJ-ASFIptw3tI5qAYpigB38Iwrs0bwkh7vkZbxpH94g-X3ttWQWpRLMiconAxYtI_GXyix5cyXSlJINdECTWE0rdpkHbBqhuLmF7W_Cq3aeZ7dAT6399WDYmqb1a__RnMbFoNuhcDbcR2KFlpoco1YRNeA7sQrmN4f4zsGmklqlNKqUqesZTI2T-RiYtsLsz0%3D)
---

name: Team DMP
subject: Our best chance to defend the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend, have you heard the news out of Florida?

**Former Congresswoman Debbie Mucarsel-Powell just launched her campaign to DEFEAT extremist Republican Sen. Rick Scott!** This is one of our best — _and only_ — chances to expand our Senate majority in 2024.

Experts are already saying that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection — and early polling puts Debbie ONE POINT AHEAD in this neck-and-neck race. But last time around, Scott spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.

Debbie is counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors like you to build a war chest capable of taking on Rick Scott’s money machine in this critical battleground race. [Please, will you split $10 or more between Debbie and the Voter Protection Project before midnight to become a Founding Donor in our fight to flip Florida blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52348?t=6&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_) | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52348?t=7&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
---
Rick Scott is one of the worst Republicans in Washington. _His radical policies are even too extreme for Mitch McConnell!_ If he had things his way, he’d end Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on working families, and ban abortions nationwide.

**But here’s the good news:** As Scott has grown more radical and unpopular, his favorability ratings and chances of winning reelection have PLUMMETED. He won his seat last time with only **0.12%** of the vote — and now, experts at _CNN, Roll Call,_ and _FiveThirtyEight_ are calling Florida one of Democrats’ best pickup opportunities in 2024.

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running against him to defend our democracy, strengthen our economy, stop gun violence, and protect reproductive rights. In an election year as critical as 2024, we must take advantage of this incredible opportunity to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.

**With Rick Scott sitting on a massive war chest, the only way Debbie can fight back and win is with a surge of grassroots resources from people like YOU.**

[So please, friend, will you split a donation right now and become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat Rick Scott and defend our majority? Together, we can show Scott that he can’t buy his way back to the Senate.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52348?t=8&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52349?t=9&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52350?t=10&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52351?t=11&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52352?t=12&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52348?t=13&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
_Team DMP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10268%2E878179%2EYb5gv_)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This number means everything to our campaign.
#
This number means everything to our campaign, Peter:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36212?refcode=em20230903-3683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3683%2E614464%2EJ2i0SY)
Thanks to grassroots supporters just like you in Missouri + all across the country, we’ve built a record-breaking people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take back this U.S. Senate seat for the people.
**In August, our average online donation was just $23.89.**
Whether folks responded to an email like this one, saw one of our Facebook ads, got one of our texts, or even just visited our website — this kind of small-dollar support plays a critical role in setting Lucas + our entire campaign up for success. **And with our next major end-of-quarter FEC deadline coming up at the end of this month, we’ve got to keep it going...**
National Republicans and corporate mega-donors are doing everything they can to keep Missouri’s Senate seat under their thumb. A few weeks ago, we even learned that they put more than **$1 MILLION** into a brand new Super PAC to prop up Hawley’s campaign and fund even more desperate attacks about Lucas.
So if we’re going to be able to continue fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of every Missouri voter between now and Election Day, we have no choice but to keep up this grassroots momentum. **That’s why we’re asking:**
**[Will you chip in $23.89, $15, or anything at all toward our grassroots movement today, Peter? Lucas is proud to run a truly people-powered campaign — and it wouldn’t be possible without your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36212?refcode=em20230903-3683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3683%2E614464%2EJ2i0SY)**

name: LCV Top 5
subject: IRA Successes. Endorsements. New Monuments. Offshore Wind. Democracy & Climate Action.
body:
https://links.messages.lcv.

Dear Peter,

April was a busy month for protecting our Earth. All month, LCV, with your support, held leaders accountable and won policies that will build a healthier, more just, and more sustainable world for all.

The month kicked off with the release of the latest urgent report https://links.messages.lcv. from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC), which states in stark terms what we already know: this is our "now or never moment" to act on climate change. The U.N. called the window for action to stabilize the climate "vanishingly small" https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C36jdNhRr/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/, yet stressed that nations can still preserve a livable planet if we act boldly now, especially if we rapidly expand clean renewable energy as the core driver of climate solutions.

LCV couldn't agree more ? this is the hope that motivates us to keep pushing elected leaders https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ at every level of government to turn their climate promises into reality and deliver solutions to millions of people NOW.

With your support, we have renewed our advocacy for Congress to enact the $550 billion in equitable climate investments already passed by the U.S. House before Memorial Day, which is also the start of summer and the season of severe climate impacts including hurricanes and wildfires in North America.

We honored National Park Week (the week before Earth Day) by mobilizing supporters to tell President Biden to designate two new national monuments that preserve unique places and help protect 30% of U.S. land and water by 2030. We held Earth Day events across the country, including a large "Fight for Our Future" rally in Washington, D.C., part of a national push https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzsVgqPLC0/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/ to build momentum and pressure for the White House and Senate leaders to act on climate now.

We did all this, and much more, to protect our Earth this month, detailed below. And now, here are your LCV Top 5 items for April 2022:

The Top Story

LCV and Partner Groups: Congress Must Pass Climate Package Before Memorial Day https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTwaqW0HV/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/

Ahead of President Biden's remarks on Earth Day https://links.messages.lcv., LCV joined some of the nation's top environmental, environmental justice, and public health groups in a pointed letter to President Biden https://links.messages.lcv. urging him to take swift action on climate by finalizing a deal to pass into law the $555 billion in climate, justice, jobs, and clean energy investments that the House of Representatives approved last November. READ the full letter here https://links.messages.lcv..

The Earth Day letter came just one day before LCV and our partners in the labor and environmental justice movements brought thousands of activists and advocates to deliver this message to elected leaders with a rally in Washington, D.C., and more than 100 other events around the country. The Earth Day events, letter, and other actions are all part of our renewed push to get a deal on climate legislation before Memorial Day, which will put the U.S. on a path to energy independence while cutting households' energy costs and climate emissions at least in half by 2030 and building an equitable, inclusive, and just future for all.

Our Earth Day rally and renewed advocacy push has gained media attention across the country, including from the New York Times https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcv8kdKfE/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/, Washington Post https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcY_jxqC~/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/, TIME magazine https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfDVP~3Cm/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/, CNN https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s84kepsY/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/, and other outlets.

Related: On Earth Day, President Biden signed an executive order recognizing the need to protect old-growth and mature forests, boost wildfire resilience, and combat global deforestation. READ LCV's statement here https://links.messages.lcv..
Rounding out the Top 5

New Ads: Climate Groups Call out Republicans for Taking Big Oil Money (VIDEO) https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MPyzw7f~

Maryland Enacts the Strongest Carbon Pollution Goal in the Nation https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxfjabz3M-

Artists Building Community Power: Daniel Gonzolez https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcY_jxqCL~

Environmental Ads Thank Senators for Confirming Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson https://links.messages.lcv.

THE BEST THING YOU CAN DO RIGHT NOW

In honor of Earth Day and National Park Week, the best thing you can do right now is support our campaign https://links.messages.lcv. to urge President Biden to use the Antiquities Act to designate Avi Kwa Ame and Castner Range as national monuments and support our goal of 30x30.

Permanent protections for Avi Kwa Ame in Nevada would preserve sacred Indigenous sites and biodiverse wildlife in the Mojave Desert. For Castner Range in Texas, permanent protections would preserve significant ecological, geological, paleontological, and archaeological features and a cultural history that dates back 10,000 years.

Many national parks, including Grand Canyon, Olympic, Joshua Tree, Acadia, and Zion, were first protected as national monuments under the Antiquities Act of 1906, which gives presidents the authority to protect places of historic and scientific interest.

Last year, President Biden committed to the country's first-ever national conservation goal of protecting 30% of our lands and waters in the country by 2030. If we are going to reach that goal, we need to make significant progress this year.

CLICK HERE TO SIGN THE PETITION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_

In Case You Missed It: LCV in the news:

https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQxNjXzMD/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/ https://links.messages.lcv.

https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6feD8_jt-/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/ https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwk~

https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~2AdzB_/UDZITElxTndXaEE5NjhKNm1yUy9IeW16ak9KQzdUK2hLTVJ3RUFpNG9oalJVMDNqUkMwUTNDOGlFMTVmcUNuL2hnMjQ4eXdFQzhFWWJMaWlVVXZXT2lGYWt5V0JWYjROQTQ2eVlCZ1ZlL289S0/ https://links.messages.lcv.

Shop Corner
https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdD_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9904979&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDA3MTc5OQS2&spReportId=MTgyMDA3MTc5OQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9904979&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDA3MTc5OQS2&spReportId=MTgyMDA3MTc5OQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://www.lcv.org/ https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9904979&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDA3MTc5OQS2&spReportId=MTgyMDA3MTc5OQS2

name: Dr. Shawn Wilson for Governor
subject: Pushing past the barbs
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
TEAM WILSON WEEKLY UPDATES
Peter,
As we gear up for the first televised debate of the election season next week, the barbs are coming out from all sides, with baseless attacks aimed at us and the other candidates in the field.
The RGA recently released an ad lying about my record.
Here's my campaign's response:
“Louisianans are not buying the RGA’s lies or clear efforts to steer the conversation away from Republicans’ intra-party war,” said Wilson for Governor Campaign Manager Brandin Campbell . “There’s only one candidate in the race with a proven record of building bridges by bringing people together to solve the very real challenges facing our state, and that is Dr. Shawn Wilson, who successfully led a $5.5 billion investment into more than 7,000 miles of improvements across Louisiana — reconnecting our communities and creating thousands of good-paying construction jobs. We look forward to watching the Republican field continue to tear itself apart as Shawn stays focused on traveling the state and earning the support of voters from New Orleans to Shreveport who know they can count on him to keep delivering real results.”
I am proud to be the candidate in this race with a real record delivering for all of Louisiana, improving quality of life for our residents. I am ready to get to work as your Governor to build on this strong record of accomplishments and increase critical opportunities, including support for rural and urban communities alike each with unique needs and chances to grow and expand participation in our state's economy. Together, we have a bright future ahead but it's going to take all of us. Let's spread the word and get to work!
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL
Lake Charles
Last week I spoke with the Louisiana Clerks of Court . I shared my commitment to integrating technology and collaboration with them. I support their commitment to stable, consistent records management that they provide to keep local governments and court systems moving all across Louisiana.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Baton Rouge
I visited with United Campus Workers , an affiliate of AFL-CIO . They stood tall and got an increase in pay for PhD students at LSU. I committed to stand with them on issues of fair compensation, benefits, academic freedom, and so much more.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
New Orleans
#TeamWilson showed up and showed out at our Meet & Greet at the Zulu Social Aid & Pleasure Club . There, I was grateful to connect with members of the Divine 9 , supporters, and concerned citizens alike.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Arcadia
Sunday morning, I joined golfers at the Rogers C. & Lafayette Jackson 16th Annual Scholarship Golf Tournament in Arcadia. Thank you to Haynesville Mayor Roderick D. Hampton for the invitation.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Rayne
Rayne was pouring on the excitement Friday night! With local organizations, churches, the Divine Nine Organizations , and many supporters of our message in attendance, the energy and commitment to creating positive change for Louisiana could be felt all around.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Baton Rouge
Tuesday's Louisiana Parole Project luncheon featured compelling life stories that celebrate second chances. With the program's recidivism rate at 2%, this is a model for Louisiana.
It's time to invest in proven programs that empower people to make positive changes in their lives and ultimately uplift our communities.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Lake Charles
In Lake Charles I got a question from a young soccer player who asked what kids can do to help our state. With ambition like that, I had to add him to my cabinet: He will be Youth Governor for the day on Day 1 of the Wilson administration.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
At the Louisiana Travel Association Forum , I committed to fully funding tourism, protecting the visitor enterprise fund, and making sure LED is committed to supporting this industry. This is critical to our economy! I will support tourism all across the state and invest in infrastructure to ensure it's easy to move across the state, including rail. Sustaining our tourism workforce means making communities safer, improving educational outcomes, ensuring healthcare is affordable and accessible, and increasing wages. All beautiful things!
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Homer
On my travels from Shreveport to Monroe, I stopped to visit Representative-elect Rashid Young who sponsored lunch for the Homer High football team along with his family. It was such a pleasure to wish them well in their first game of the year against Farmerville! The Fighting Pelicans are a championship-caliber team with a strong game plan and support system, much like Team Wilson!
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Bossier Parish
I was so grateful to receive a fantastic reception in Bossier Parish! Thank you to everyone who recognized my work bolstering our infrastructure with projects improving Barksdale, Jimmie Davis Bridge, I-20, and so much more. Residents were also excited about the linear park that is in the works. Big things happening in Bossier!
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Shreveport
The incredible Shreveport Women for Wilson I met with yesterday brought the energy and engagement that fuels this campaign. They want a Governor who is competent, courageous, collaborative, and committed. That is what is needed to build a better Louisiana for all, and that is what I will deliver.
Join Women for Wilson [http://wilsonforla.com/women] and we will announce the first 1,000 to join this critical cause.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Baker
What better way to kick off a full weekend of Labor Day festivities than in Baker this morning ahead of the parade with members of the AFL-CIO ! I was energized to see the Grand Marshall, State Rep. Barbara Carpenter and State Senator Regina Barrow showing their support for the hardworking men and women across Louisiana. This race is about working families all across this state, and I'm ready to be a governor who works just as hard as they do every day.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
ENDORSEMENTS
Woodworth Mayor David Butler
“Dr. Shawn Wilson spent the last seven years delivering historic improvements that Louisianans have needed for decades," Woodworth Mayor David Butler said. "The DOTD may not be the flashiest department in state government, but if every department were run the way he ran DOTD, a lot of Louisiana's problems would be on the way to being addressed. I anticipate historic progress for Louisiana across the board when we elect Shawn Wilson as Governor."
WILSONFORLA.COM [WILSONFORLA.COM]
Mayors of Cheneyville, Haynesville, and Donaldsonville
The Wilson Wave is growing and I'm proud to have small-town support from all over the beautiful state of Louisiana.
From Cheneyville to Haynesville to Donaldsonville, your trusted Mayors have put their trust in me to be the best Governor Louisiana has seen.
wilsoforla.com [wilsoforla.com]
More Support From Our Valued Legislators
My message is resonating with your trusted representatives. I am honored to have the support and endorsement of three of New Orleans' boldest changemakers, Representatives Aimee Adatto Freeman , Mandie Landry , and Delisha Boyd .
With powerful and passionate people supporting me, I know we can advance gender equality, create economic opportunity, ensure access to quality healthcare and education, and much more.
wilsoforla.com [wilsoforla.com]
Ironworkers Local 623
Thank you to Ironworkers Local 623 and Joshua Sonnier for your support and endorsement. We share a commitment to putting your members to work building a better Louisiana. With relationships like this and coalitions as strong as iron, there is no limit to what we can accomplish for everyday Louisianans!
wilsoforla.com [wilsoforla.com]
UPCOMING EVENTS
New Orleans
I am excited for the first televised debate of the campaign, hosted by WWLTV and the Urban League of Louisiana , but disappointed that it has been marred by Jeff Landry's boycott.
Thankfully, Louisiana voters recognize Landry’s refusal to debate before the Urban League for what it is – a thinly-veiled dog whistle that proves the Attorney General is only interested in representing the people who will give him a free pass.
I look forward to engaging with voters and sharing the best plans in the race for building a better Louisiana with a wide audience next Thursday, September 7th at 7 pm.
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Host%20Shawn%20At%20An%20Event]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com] .
With hope,
Shawn Wilson
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]
LEARN MORE [WILSONFORLA.COM]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/408Tlfh_cUKqKl0Yd-tKBw2?unsubscribedata=XHtgROR029XCu%2Fhn4ynLTKhJ4GGZmi1rr6RshIrTJi7r5qSQMddfHzNlVaivPodbMCm7%2FfkLgZRePKVo%2FTgdbXpe%2B868b%2BHkBS8M%2F%2B8tog5m8FxBGY8XhTf%2BLxp1A3lAOhcqUvwY%2FDjB0bo97EWW5GOMsgz89hWqjAsZHWsymb9npDUfGbW8hGaaGiAtBsZ35%2BAdcTJJVwmjbMsHixF1oRm%2F9LcceLOHxCGveqjtdpjbsthpHvtp4V6XxAEubs%2BwtTWT0xcggbA1PV4gMOQn80fD%2BXBkX57D3WVzIHhJHx%2Fg3y0EaKgNUUHLM7xNTSOo5V%2BtpP9tR09EqX7Gldla3vxuFalRLFccp6qqlQyT5RkMbhIq2uAabKzTA068HjpLdGnYpzN%2BAdRSnor%2BzBNiSgf1pinblmv%2Bi0foS8W712trfiMHO0KZTCft9csBAtWV .

We’re already facing a gun violence epidemic in this country, and this could set us back even further in our fight for gun safety reform.

---

[_Sign our petition to tell the Supreme Court to uphold federal law that prohibits people accused of domestic violence from possessing guns >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69137710/425225021/827420681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjlmMjRjOTAtNmE0YS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rZ6CfekL5qH-PAELjfvxE2VqdahXuCC2HYvZP6rm1YQ=&emci=e7826f2a-cb48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b9f24c90-6a4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)**

Listen, the Supreme Court’s decision to take up this case could have horrible repercussions for victims of domestic abuse.

Laws like this are in place to ensure that firearms stay out of the hands of dangerous individuals.

To put things in perspective – 1 in 3 women and 1 in 4 men have experienced some form of physical violence by a partner.

We’re already facing a gun violence epidemic in this country, and this could set us back even further in our fight for gun safety reform.

name: [social security alert] via TCP
subject: the GOP is anti-seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. She wants hard working Americans (**_like YOU_**) to work longer. Why you might ask?

Here’s a hint: **_It’s right in line with what her billionaire corporate donors want!!!_**

Here at The Collective PAC, we don’t stand for this nonsense. We fight to **PROTECT** your right to Social Security — because we aren’t beholden to corporate interests like Nikki Haley.

**But fighting back against the corporate greed of the GOP comes with a cost: We have to rely fully on grassroots supporters like YOU, Peter. And going up against corporate interests isn’t cheap.**

[That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us fight for Democrats who will protect social security and working people? name: Team Pramila
subject: Add your name to the WISE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week, Pramila introduced the Working for Immigrant Safety and Empowerment (WISE) Act to protect immigrant survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender-based violence.
#
Peter, we need to do more to protect immigrants in our country.
Immigrant women are significantly more likely to suffer domestic violence, nearly three times the national average. It’s crucial that we do everything we can to ensure survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender-based violence are protected.
That’s why, last week, Pramila introduced the Working for Immigrant Safety and Empowerment (WISE) Act to protect immigrant survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender-based violence.
As a progressive movement, **it is our duty and moral obligation to keep our communities safe and protect our neighbors, no matter their race, ethnicity, citizenship status, or background.[If you stand with Pramila and our movement, please add your name to our petition to urge Congress to pass the WISE Act and protect immigrant survivors.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-WISE-act/?source=em20230903-2878&t=1&akid=2878%2E420207%2E9TurnL)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-WISE-act/?source=em20230903-2878&t=2&akid=2878%2E420207%2E9TurnL)**
Immigrant women and children are particularly vulnerable to domestic violence, and the rate of abuse against immigrant women is nearly 49 percent, nearly three times the national average. And they are less likely to report these instances due to fear of deportation.
The WISE Act would ensure that immigrants have access to protections intended by the bipartisan Violence Against Women Act (VAWA), the Trafficking Victim Protection Act (TVPA), and other federal and state laws. **And most importantly, this bill will ensure survivors pursuing relief are not detained or deported before their applications are fully adjudicated.**
Victims of violence should be able to receive justice, no matter what. **[Add your name to stand with Pramila and our progressive movement as we fight to ensure all immigrants have the federal and state protections they need to feel and be safe.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-WISE-act/?source=em20230903-2878&t=3&akid=2878%2E420207%2E9TurnL)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230903-2878-footer&t=4&refcode2=2878_420207_9TurnL&akid=2878%2E420207%2E9TurnL)**
---

name: Colin Allred
subject: I'm sweating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I'm sweating, friend.
And it's not just because of the Texas heat. It's because August has been really slow for fundraising.
I know, we just reported our record-breaking fundraising numbers and everyone from CNN to FiveThirtyEight says we can win this race.
But our incredible start to this race makes me one of the Republican's top targets in 2024.
Friend, we can't afford to fall short on this (or any) fundraising goal if we're going to power this campaign to victory and bring real change to Texas. So please, split a donation of $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help me defeat Ted Cruz. → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Unlike Cruz, I'm not counting on wealthy donors to buy this seat for me because I believe our leaders should be accountable to the people they serve, not special interests.
And listen, Texas is huge – it takes over 11 hours to drive from the Panhandle to the southernmost point.
That means we need way more volunteers, pamphlets, folks knocking doors, and yard signs to win in Texas than it does in other states. And that adds up fast.
So I'm counting on folks like you to step up with $5, $10, or whatever you can spare, to power our massive grassroots campaign and help create the change we know Texans want and need.
Right now, I'm counting on you to help me raise $50,000 by midnight to get back on track. So please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America and help me fire Ted Cruz? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much – and in all seriousness, I hope you are keeping cool amid record-breaking temperatures this summer!
Colin Allred

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Sign ON to tell Republicans NO raise in retirement age!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | | **Do Republicans want our young people to work until they die?

** **[Tell Republicans we say NO to raising the Social Security retirement age!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7Tnqk9es_044PWbJQlefyUfw9MEmCF4N9TIdj6w3wMrf-qGCW0TnDxHqwNK4_UKQDg-5-k-s8aUvQbdIa4v5W04QSgJG9nFf8-bapcp4MbULOlcIecAv_FMqgr7IOtfcCmk8Qo9G3LGWSY1D3m0-t5QM-vaLP9EdfhNx45_gKryOOj2FWl8DWls0QkRqBRUmBYG3fFwDX9VKXCLxlpWvfJOkwqs35cSemSqro6hgCf1HJDa1WNppYev5Br_ozdF0DcClFRENNR2qxIWMrO1I2a90ChUefa7PykTeGxkxYf-YqNC60LvTZuE5Yci0ydHWYV3Zx2Mi685DS6yLoJ1RS6kRxMl18HyL-SwCMKuSHiRpUcyIPmJ8YLdPHEZsvmQueEsKGhMBcWBunOSQvK9zU_Vd_OMqhMaRnDGd_yC8QTxOl7i5-JC_Z6tWDVu-hCRfeowr13TJhF6iAsZmi1wCz8dOrQzUPb7Uc_2yU4HwXBH2-C6iw9LaovPNI7PbuKCLujQvU/3za/4lweEkZlTnKYsJphHCiQkQ/h0/ase7DM8y7_Xa9JBLzgWGG57eZkPwesogwkECmBs_I1Q) **
People in the United States aren’t living as long as they used to. According to the Center for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), life expectancy in the US is now 76.4 years, the lowest it’s been in nearly two decades.

Given that statistic, you would think our elected representatives would be looking for ways to lower the Social Security retirement age, but Republicans are in fact _trying to increase it to 70 years old for young adults.
_
Tethered to Wall Street greed, Republicans have repeatedly proposed cutting the already modest Social Security benefits and raising the minimum retirement age to “save” the program (i.e. make sure the rich don’t pay another dime in taxes).

**Republicans since Ronald Reagan have been chipping away at Social Security, the program that many retired folks depend on to make ends meet! And now they want to do it by sticking it to young people!**
**
**[**Join us and sign the petition telling Republicans NO WAY to raising the retirement age!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7Tnqk9es_044PWbJQlefyUfw9MEmCF4N9TIdj6w3wMrf-qGCW0TnDxHqwNK4_UKQDg-5-k-s8aUvQbdIa4v5W04QSgJG9nFf8-bapcp4MbULOlcIecAv_FMqgr7IOtfcCmk8Qo9G3LGWSY1D3m0-t5QM-vaLP9EdfhNx45_gKryOOj2FWl8DWls0QkRqBRUmBYG3fFwDX9VKXCLxlpWvfJOkwqs35cSemSqro6hgCf1HJDa1WNppYev5Br_ozdF0DcClFRENNR2qxIWMrO1I2a90ChZ84khyA6arIJ4tV10YZEWAVPMqe5iUMk75UktcLU-W7HS-MdS-iJaKQzyLEdFBMoXryoe0O0DpbLeCbv5LjmQ0lBEuGYHydBlRdjyi8XZ61vnXni7NMB4yye0bTyLwLV2MpyL230Il83aWFLv8F4JAp2IL36sty_BVpb5opSrZReXzG0fKMgLasVQ6flUuDXS7BM7Xn7I2GU4ffjZ-eg6tsdoJ9scVXMiZ4UgmV8CKY/3za/4lweEkZlTnKYsJphHCiQkQ/h1/WNFiGE9go6MEVT_RV7cTsXm15UQ89whOVK79Om2mliw)

[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7Tnqk9es_044PWbJQlefyUfw9MEmCF4N9TIdj6w3wMrf-qGCW0TnDxHqwNK4_UKQDg-5-k-s8aUvQbdIa4v5W04QSgJG9nFf8-bapcp4MbULOlcIecAv_FMqgr7IOtfcCmk8Qo9G3LGWSY1D3m0-t5QM-vaLP9EdfhNx45_gKryOOj2FWl8DWls0QkRqBRUmBYG3fFwDX9VKXCLxlpWvfJOkwqs35cSemSqro6hgCf1HJDa1WNppYev5Br_ozdF0DcClFRENNR2qxIWMrO1I2a90ChFWGrMinOj6bj5Gg3ZAf0lZjSdbbNTqWT-2DYY18RfB6e27H5rsTBoOUiG3g3jqygmjM0z4hTjikpZrRAZNQmWspQBnZkbZU8K7frbJp7QIUYjuiUOgsBdDLmKUQVb_Bk0rVlTBavp749A1VFCIku9G52GmtYjiAVKjhyDJarUER-Wv-bIypUrlZb8CoBYh9jSLhM7YXcEQQtZZ8j_sxe_g2H-Ixs1AY38vNY2bzgvWM/3za/4lweEkZlTnKYsJphHCiQkQ/h2/In3oOdQjQeP6kaNPLOVzSKZxgbPwYZfah68xQ7VVkNE)
Raising the retirement age is essentially an across-the-board benefit cut for younger workers.

Young workers are already struggling to save for retirement because of stagnant wages, student loan debts, and inflation. Now if the Republicans get their wish, young people may be forced to work later into their old age.
**
According to a poll by Quinnipiac University, 78% of surveyed Americans do NOT want to see the full retirement age raised.
**

clean_body: | | | Do Republicans want our young people to work until they die? People in the United States aren’t living as long as they used to. According to the Center for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), life expectancy in the US is now 76.4 years, the lowest it’s been in nearly two decades. Given that statistic, you would think our elected representatives would be looking for ways to lower the Social Security retirement age, but Republicans are in fact trying to increase it to 70 years old for young adults. Tethered to Wall Street greed, Republicans have repeatedly proposed cutting the already modest Social Security benefits and raising the minimum retirement age to “save” the program (i.e. make sure the rich don’t pay another dime in taxes). Republicans since Ronald Reagan have been chipping away at Social Security, the program that many retired folks depend on to make ends meet! And now they want to do it by sticking it to young people! Raising the retirement age is essentially an across-the-board benefit cut for younger workers. Young workers are already struggling to save for retirement because of stagnant wages, student loan debts, and inflation. Now if the Republicans get their wish, young people may be forced to work later into their old age. According to a poll by Quinnipiac University, 78% of surveyed Americans do NOT want to see the full retirement age raised. All workers deserve to retire in time to enjoy retirement. — Derek Marshall for Congress Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | | | Sent via . body:

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=414%2E52803%2Ed-N69p)

| | Hey Peter, sorry to bug you during the long weekend, but I’ll try to keep this short. I’ve been keeping an eye on our ActBlue numbers over the last couple of days, and I’m worried we’re not getting the boost we need to start September on a high note. I figure that before I talk to Angela about it, I’d instead try reaching out to our grassroots supporters and see if we can’t turn things around before the end of the weekend. **[Can you chip in $25 before going about the rest of your weekend? It would mean the world to Angela to see a huge groundswell of support to start the month.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5370?t=10&amount=25&akid=414%2E52803%2Ed-N69p)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5370?t=11&amount=25&akid=414%2E52803%2Ed-N69p)
---
I know you get a lot of emails about why fundraising goals are so important, from getting the word out about Angela’s record and policies, to connecting with voters in every corner of Maryland.
But spending all my time at Alsobrooks HQ gives me a different perspective, so here’s how I think of these things:
_Every dollar we raise is maybe another phone call we can make, or another door we can knock on. It might be one more piece or mail or an extra yard sign. On its own, it might not seem like much._
But believe me, it is.
**[That’s why I’m taking a few minutes out of my Sunday to ask for your help, Peter. Will you pitch in a few bucks so we can do the work reaching Maryland voters in their communities?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5370?t=12&amount=25&akid=414%2E52803%2Ed-N69p)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

Daniel Cooper
_Deputy Campaign Manager_

---
Friends —
At the end of June we closed the books on our second quarterly FEC fundraising deadline of the year.
We’re proud that thousands of folks on this team stepped up to make their contributions as we inched towards the deadline. Our grassroots supporters are who sustain this progressive movement as we work to take on the attacks from the far-right and reelect Ilhan.
But the fact is, we’re just weeks away from our next FEC deadline, and less than 15% of our supporters have made their first donation.
We really need to grow that number if we want to be able to take on the folks who stand in our way: right-wing super-PACs, corporate special interests, AIPAC, and everyone else who fights against progress and equality for all.
We can’t afford to fall behind our numbers from last quarter, which are now public for all to see. If we do, it could send all the wrong messages about the strength of this campaign.
So please:
**[Make a contribution to Ilhan’s campaign today and join the folks who have made their first donation to help keep pushing our movement and this nation forward.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230903-1-t2&t=5&akid=508%2E791427%2EW8E3Ho)**

Thank you in advance for any support you can show as we continue forward towards this next big fundraising deadline.
\- Team Ilhan

We’re proud that thousands of folks on this team stepped up to make their contributions as we inched towards the deadline. Our grassroots supporters are who sustain this progressive movement as we work to take on the attacks from the far-right and reelect Ilhan. But the fact is, we’re just weeks away from our next FEC deadline, and less than 15% of our supporters have made their first donation. We really need to grow that number if we want to be able to take on the folks who stand in our way: right-wing super-PACs, corporate special interests, AIPAC, and everyone else who fights against progress and equality for all. We can’t afford to fall behind our numbers from last quarter, which are now public for all to see. If we do, it could send all the wrong messages about the strength of this campaign. So please: Thank you in advance for any support you can show as we continue forward towards this next big fundraising deadline. \- Team Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

The United Auto Workers contract is set to expire in just 11 days on September 14th. Recently, 97% of auto workers who work for the Big Three―Ford, GM, and Stellantis (formerly Fiat Chrysler)―voted to authorize a strike. [**This Labor Day weekend, stand with workers by sending a message to the CEOs of the Big Three automakers demanding they meet workers’ demands of fair pay, benefits, and an end to two-tiered wages.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk0CTCdzMxgqSqd7rKusgOElqlNSTtI9_tQPxGBOZDdJUZt1tCrc96JhKnuBNDbF-dd-hFLnkb1PaDoBlgWuyojPVkW9ATrVSIWh2-nOzLcoPeDGkqYEfbzUXht68Bzm0F0UgCHT6aUYQ7_CbJOy87pYfv7B-ALa5-pXglGSvWb-ba4ZNCovTiXH6DJcYpY5b-fMGKcL4AFpbIH5whpgCpU3-6OQz8fPF84Bf3m-U08O5DkzpCePlfBwBgjryJYp1vizhPVkHrve39jWNbM1WnflupwKUt1fu7nSIWAFMl1p5kP9oYkGHU5t-PQbg8wE5eYUmsCan8IO6wOpX6gtH4C9KSFct6kNDWbr1RdhVigetA-fLSoUbR7g6WniXUOrTA9S1JruZrPgN_CfUoLfK5GzRkAKngmFIijjxbfFfplo1A58z_MnpuRABW4IIFChyeI-teTnz0TlIB7Jh0s2cFnDd6KOeXL_aG4V-cG73HUde53pfglxksA-KnK9s7PJuOT7NZxar91qhMYFTSboMR8UiMqOB5gy57tkeEiZmxHpA/3za/wXtN164HSqylIVEsl0HIuQ/h1/Kb_qOPqmzkZyHE41KI7bSaoI3tS07Lu1XLgXboA4_-Q) | [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk0CTCdzMxgqSqd7rKusgOElqlNSTtI9_tQPxGBOZDdJUZt1tCrc96JhKnuBNDbF-dd-hFLnkb1PaDoBlgWuyojPVkW9ATrVSIWh2-nOzLcoPeDGkqYEfbzUXht68Bzm0F0UgCHT6aUYQ7_CbJOy87pYfv7B-ALa5-pXglGSvWb-ba4ZNCovTiXH6DJcYpY5b-fMGKcL4AFpbIH5whpgCpU3-6OQz8fPF84Bf3m-U08O5DkzpCePlfBwBgjryJYp1vizhPVkHrve39jWNbM1WnflupwKUt1fu7nSIWAFMl1p1rOMqIgZI3rWxhs9dPliXBA31yFwqAwzkXKPnK7FwjROlg8dbwtKb5CH3aQvp-EIKXeU0lzIFbqR1snvrNkck2vysuyi19mlFI7UeBk36WxWDT34eBHVC0odzxcS-IK2R1PQ2R_kZmM8vYvXTcBM5czntWkCxUHYOm1pCKr5kp8NgE8EeypvVpop58hTA7a5MmS3F5UwIArKnoVuJg-aleQ6g4uJnsjKEN6UXm_NB7fkGZ-Qn1NkLT5o8kToyIn6w/3za/wXtN164HSqylIVEsl0HIuQ/h2/bYqzkiyQIyYg4co--xl8_fOsT2do2jI63-eC1Px5WFo)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Aug 25, 2023
Subject: Tell the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis: Meet workers’ demands!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Auto workers are preparing to go on strike.
The current UAW (United Auto Workers) contract expires on September 14, and workers are demanding fair pay with benefits and an end to two-tiered wages―a hiring system in which workers doing the same jobs get paid much less.
As auto worker and union member Ricky Brand, a Ford worker for the last 9 years, said in a recent interview:
> _"It is hurtful to sit next to people and make less than they do and work just as hard as they do no matter what industry and what you're doing."_
Auto workers hired today are making $10 an hour less than what they made in 2007, when adjusting for inflation. In addition, the majority of workers employed by the Big Three―Ford, GM, and Stellantis (formerly Fiat Chrysler)―are now considered temporary or “supplemental” workers, even though they’re being asked to work the same hours as full time workers, but at lower wages with less healthcare and no retirement benefits.
**While corporations are fighting back against workers’ rights and wages, the Big Three automakers raked in a combined $20 billion in profits in just the first 6 months of this year.**
[**Click here to send a message directly to the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis and demand they meet workers’ demands of fair pay with benefits.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk0CTCdzMxgqSqd7rKusgOElqlNSTtI9_tQPxGBOZDdJUZt1tCrc96JhKnuBNDbF-dd-hFLnkb1PaDoBlgWuyojPVkW9ATrVSIWh2-nOzLcoPeDGkqYEfbzUXht68Bzm0F0UgCHT6aUYQ7_CbJOy87pYfv7B-ALa5-pXglGSvWb-ba4ZNCovTiXH6DJcYpY5b-fMGKcL4AFpbIH5whpgCpU3-6OQz8fPF84Bf3m-U08O5DkzpCePlfBwBgjryJYp1vizhPVkHrve39jWNbM1WnflupwKUt1fu7nSIWAFMl1p8_94fTBHbDilp9F60osLgXtxkc_JxEp9lkgGDh4_rqlOkSQY9TcmaKwPdCOHlnawAbUxxMX0lFKjy6Dq0jn1oN432rx3ykAJU8221f-zdH4ClbIWYJrPrb0GUP_TgGtCl7P6bBJb4Sxa0l2-RTIfcGLnqM9d7RDCdxpn0krcs_R-0BWc2BWra-x9_LpyASbR6l1ASqeZJqut3z86mjRRLfzcCcZYxaPcyROuapUKckOn4_JbTB6AvIFsDYCV-9fPQ/3za/wXtN164HSqylIVEsl0HIuQ/h4/qdJjXRoG0o6z_SfGlS_dMpNrV2zAvxoZ0YZ3s5HSn3Q)

Last year, the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis each made between $20 and $30 million―a 40% increase from just a few years ago and approximately 365 times the pay of their average employee.
Meanwhile, workers are struggling to put food on the table and stay in their homes.
The corporate assault on our communities is real. That’s why it’s so critical that we stand in solidarity with UAW workers and demand justice for all working people. **I’ve been proud to march alongside workers in Michigan, and I’m inspired by their fight for what they deserve.**
**When my** **dad started working at Ford and joined the UAW, he was able to obtain benefits after 90 days. He qualified for a pension and benefited from the Cost of Living Adjustment (COLA) that was part of the union contract.** There were no tiers or temp worker status. It's time for the Big Three to do right by the workers who sacrificed so much to help them stay afloat in 2009.
[**Let’s have the backs of autoworkers in Detroit and across the country! Click here to watch a brand new report from our friends at More Perfect Union, then send a message directly to the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis and demand they meet workers’ demands.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk0CTCdzMxgqSqd7rKusgOElqlNSTtI9_tQPxGBOZDdJUZt1tCrc96JhKnuBNDbF-dd-hFLnkb1PaDoBlgWuyojPVkW9ATrVSIWh2-nOzLcoPeDGkqYEfbzUXht68Bzm0F0UgCHT6aUYQ7_CbJOy87pYfv7B-ALa5-pXglGSvWb-ba4ZNCovTiXH6DJcYpY5b-fMGKcL4AFpbIH5whpgCpU3-6OQz8fPF84Bf3m-U08O5DkzpCePlfBwBgjryJYp1vizhPVkHrve39jWNbM1WnflupwKUt1fu7nSIWAFMl1pwlktHotqN1GIT8eIAfc8z3W067CXwTxeONLFfEn9-2sH3ABKo-7Za5ky3DhuG8aUwvkcSafsIfZ5nRfhWaiI0Uus6X7fcoOwzTC4Ll5BSHhy1eFthVVLviaFRp7ao6Ot1O_usSOtA4i2fNawILIx9OFI--Pel3OR8mRusmfvcf05ycwVAuL5i0bfFtU_9sBPiRRdO4CoWH7vQimW5IziPd1ffkKBy9FQR-ENHAOjbzTc4h7MM2CqSwMQ7m1g6YzLw/3za/wXtN164HSqylIVEsl0HIuQ/h6/rDJ-AukNnaVcAiZMRFgMsRt75UFPkDf7qMpB0mXfIvY)

clean_body: This Labor Day weekend, stand with UAW workers. | | | The United Auto Workers contract is set to expire in just 11 days on September 14th. Recently, 97% of auto workers who work for the Big Three―Ford, GM, and Stellantis (formerly Fiat Chrysler)―voted to authorize a strike. | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Aug 25, 2023 Subject: Tell the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis: Meet workers’ demands! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Auto workers are preparing to go on strike. The current UAW (United Auto Workers) contract expires on September 14, and workers are demanding fair pay with benefits and an end to two-tiered wages―a hiring system in which workers doing the same jobs get paid much less. As auto worker and union member Ricky Brand, a Ford worker for the last 9 years, said in a recent interview: "It is hurtful to sit next to people and make less than they do and work just as hard as they do no matter what industry and what you're doing." Auto workers hired today are making $10 an hour less than what they made in 2007, when adjusting for inflation. In addition, the majority of workers employed by the Big Three―Ford, GM, and Stellantis (formerly Fiat Chrysler)―are now considered temporary or “supplemental” workers, even though they’re being asked to work the same hours as full time workers, but at lower wages with less healthcare and no retirement benefits. While corporations are fighting back against workers’ rights and wages, the Big Three automakers raked in a combined $20 billion in profits in just the first 6 months of this year. Last year, the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis each made between $20 and $30 million―a 40% increase from just a few years ago and approximately 365 times the pay of their average employee. Meanwhile, workers are struggling to put food on the table and stay in their homes. The corporate assault on our communities is real. That’s why it’s so critical that we stand in solidarity with UAW workers and demand justice for all working people. I’ve been proud to march alongside workers in Michigan, and I’m inspired by their fight for what they deserve. When my dad started working at Ford and joined the UAW, he was able to obtain benefits after 90 days. He qualified for a pension and benefited from the Cost of Living Adjustment (COLA) that was part of the union contract. There were no tiers or temp worker status. It's time for the Big Three to do right by the workers who sacrificed so much to help them stay afloat in 2009. Together, we’re holding greedy corporations accountable while fighting for the rights and wages of working people everywhere. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
The House GOP, and especially the far-right Trump side of the House GOP, are pushing the government to shutdown
#
Derek -
If you’ve been keeping up with the news, you’ll know: There are rumors of a government shutdown on the horizon.
The House GOP, and especially the far-right Trump side of the House GOP, are pushing the government to shutdown unless they’re able to make their radical agenda a reality through a bill that funds the government.
That’s bad news.
It is our opinion that the House should do their job, pass a spending bill that can get through the Senate, and get it signed by the President. The American public at large agrees.
They don’t see it that way. At least not yet.
That’s where we come in.
One of the things that VoteVets can do better than just about any organization is mobilize men and women who have served our country, and get them to take action.
And something we can do here is bring a bunch of our Veterans to DC, have them visit Congressional offices, and demand action. We can’t tolerate this brinkmanship. It weakens the country. It makes us more vulnerable to our adversaries. It’s just bad. Period.
[**Would you back us up? Let us know by adding your name if you think we should take action now to avert a shutdown. And if you’re a Veteran, you can let us know on this form, too.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230903_vv_shutdown/?source=em230903-1-30?refcode2=15734.3013755.Em6DCp&akid=15734%2E3013755%2EEm6DCp)

Hope to hear from you, Derek.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

body:
#

Team -
Right now, our gun safety majority in the Senate hangs on by a thread. If we don’t put in the work now to defend and expand it, we could _easily_ lose all of the progress we’ve made in our fight to end gun violence.
Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true.
That’s why we’ve already started our work endorsing gun safety champions for U.S. Senate:
Elissa Slotkin in Michigan. Kirsten Gillibrand in New York. Jacky Rosen in Nevada. And Debbie Mucarsel-Powell in Florida.
These four candidates are proven gun safety champions who we know will have the courage to do the work to keep our communities safe from gun violence.

Kevin has never stopped advocating for everyday working people and families — from protecting abortion rights and our democracy to strengthening our gun safety laws and combating climate change.
But there are plenty of issues out there that need attention in Washington, and that’s why Kevin wants to know which of them are MOST important to you.

name: Courier Newsroom Team
subject: Journalism the world needs today
body:
By clearly debunking the lies coming from right-wing misinformation outlets, we can arm our readers with facts about the world we live in today.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)
Peter, trust in journalism is plummeting, and it’s not hard to understand why. News organizations are more focused on profits and clicks than they are on informing the public. This is especially true for right-wing outlets like Fox News and Newsmax that rely on misinformation and outrage to drive ratings.
It’s why Donald Trump’s every move dominates cable news, and it’s how conspiracy theorists like Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and extremists like Vivek Ramaswamy have made a name for themselves in the 2024 presidential primaries.
And most distressingly, coverage of local news and urgent issues like climate change are getting completely ignored.
**Courier Newsroom aims to do journalism differently. As one of the country’s largest left-leaning news organizations, our goal is to provide reliable, fact-based coverage of local news while exposing right-wing misinformation and calling out the bad actors who actively spread it.**
**[Our newsrooms in nine battleground states (and growing!) do this important work without paywalls or subscription fees, which means we count on the support of donors like you to power our reporting. If you want to support responsible local journalism like ours, pitch in $5 or anything you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230903?refcode=em20230903&amount=5&refcode2=1496_120351_EepD1v&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230903?refcode=em20230903&amount=5&refcode2=1496_120351_EepD1v&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)**
The lack of trustworthy journalism is an enormous threat to the future of our democracy. Every community has a right to the truth so they can make informed decisions in the voting booth.
That’s why Courier’s mission is so important and it’s why we are asking for your generous support today. By providing news coverage that clearly and plainly debunks right-wing lies and misinformation, we can arm our readers with facts about the world we live in today so we can build a better tomorrow.
**[But we can't do any of this without your support, Peter. If you want to help us continue our mission of providing trustworthy, fact-based reporting to the communities that need it most, pitch in $5 or anything you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230903?refcode=em20230903&amount=5&refcode2=1496_120351_EepD1v&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230903?refcode=em20230903&amount=5&refcode2=1496_120351_EepD1v&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)**
Thank you for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1496&t=2&refcode2=1496_120351_EepD1v&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1496%2E120351%2EEepD1v)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

**Safeguarding abortion and reproductive healthcare,
