clean_body: | Happy September, team! Let me take a moment and say thank you. We just closed out August, and thanks to supporters just like you, we met our ambitious fundraising goal. This campaign is — and has always been — about you. It’s about tackling the issues that hold our families back. It’s about making sure everybody, no matter their zip code, can achieve their dreams. Your support and feedback help me do just that. | I made a pledge during my first victory speech: As long as I have the honor of serving you in Congress, I will be there for you no matter what. As a former Army Ranger, I’ve worked to bring servant leadership to the halls of Congress. My team and I are working to put the needs of our community ahead of partisanship and make this the most productive session yet. Together, we will usher a new generation of leadership to Congress. Onward! Jason | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: A top Republican made this major decision that sent Donald Trump into a fit of rage
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 03, 2023

A top Republican made
this major decision that sent Donald Trump into a fit of rage

The former President needs
plenty of allies on his side if he's to win in 2024. But lately,
that's been easier said than done.

And a top Republican made this
major decision that sent Donald Trump into a fit of rage.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden just spat in the
face of Americans with this despicable act

The Biden presidency
is up in flames. But this action might have poured gasoline on
the fire.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Democrat left
speechless from this striking betrayal

The Democrat Party is
on the brink of a civil war. There's no going back now.
➞ Continue Reading

Sarah Palin just revealed
the Democrats' secret plan for 2024

Both parties are
figuring out their strategies for the upcoming presidential
election. But the Democrats might have one that changes the game.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: James Carville
subject: I gotta talk to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=549%2E552475%2E9gVjyx)
Hey y’all, it’s Carville.
I won’t take up too much of your time today, but I gotta talk to you real quick about a good friend of mine, Bob Casey -- who’s facing the toughest fight of his career in Pennsylvania.
Truthfully, I’m getting worried about this race. Mitch McConnell is recruiting a mega-millionaire hedge fund exec to run against Bob, and if this guy jumps in, he could start flooding the airwaves as early as Day One.
The stakes couldn’t be any huger with Democrats holding just 51 Senate seats. **If grassroots donors don’t step up their game right now to fight back in PA, we just might have to kiss our Senate majority goodbye!!**
**[Please, Peter, can you spare a few bucks to keep Bob in the Senate where he belongs? We’re going to need every dollar and cent we can raise to fight back in Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230903-1?refcode=em20230903-1&refcode2=549_552475_9gVjyx&akid=549%2E552475%2E9gVjyx)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230903-1?refcode=em20230903-1&refcode2=549_552475_9gVjyx&akid=549%2E552475%2E9gVjyx)**
I’ve seen enough elections to tell you right now: Stopping Mitch McConnell and the GOP from snatching back Senate control could come straight down to winning in Pennsylvania in 2024.
Early donations make all the difference in major races like this one. Let’s not look back next year and realize we waited too long to start defending this mission-critical seat.
**[Chip in just $5 today to support my friend Bob in this tough race and ensure we hold the line against the GOP next year.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230903-1?refcode=em20230903-1&refcode2=549_552475_9gVjyx&akid=549%2E552475%2E9gVjyx)**
Thank you for your support. It couldn’t be more important!
-- James Carville
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230903-1?refcode=em20230903-1&refcode2=549_552475_9gVjyx&akid=549%2E552475%2E9gVjyx)

name: Team Cooper
subject: 3 things you need to know, Peter...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Open IMMEDIATELY.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69143274/425245130/823540626?refcode=ea.6b2b9851-7b4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6b2b9851-7b4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjJiOTg1MS03YjRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Iq1eMDMBJIfHU-4LKqMP-mJtcl_0LS3frfzo61aqXs=&emci=6cd6dfac-7f47-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6b2b9851-7b4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — GOP anti-voter legislation could undermine all future elections in North Carolina, and you need to understand the stakes. _Here are THREE things you need to know that could happen if Republicans get their way:_
1. **REDUCED ACCESS TO THE BALLOT BOX:** Absentee and early voting will be restricted, and Republicans could ensure there are fewer Election Day voting sites, too.
2. **VOTER INTIMIDATION:** Republicans want to stack our voting sites with partisan “poll observers” who might try to disrupt the voting process and prevent certain people from voting.
3. **STEALING ELECTIONS:** The GOP even wants to allow contested elections to be decided by right-wing judges or Republican legislators themselves. That would take away the people’s choice.

Peter, Roy is doing everything he can to STOP these dangerous far-right plots, but nevertheless, our democracy is on the line. Here are THREE things you need to know that could happen if Republicans get their way: 1. REDUCED ACCESS TO THE BALLOT BOX: Absentee and early voting will be restricted, and Republicans could ensure there are fewer Election Day voting sites, too. 2. VOTER INTIMIDATION: Republicans want to stack our voting sites with partisan “poll observers” who might try to disrupt the voting process and prevent certain people from voting. 3. STEALING ELECTIONS: The GOP even wants to allow contested elections to be decided by right-wing judges or Republican legislators themselves. That would take away the people’s choice. When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

_We put out the Truth. Then all hell broke loose_.

However, I discovered that the FBI and DOJ actively sabotaged our system of justice and violated multiple surveillance laws just to prevent the election of President Donald Trump. The Durham Report has fully corroborated these findings and flat-out stated the FBI had zero basis to launch any investigations into President Trump or his campaign.

This made me the target of radical politicians, the Fake News media machine, and even the Deep State itself.

Worse, I witnessed the Deep State hunt down America-First patriots and FBI whistleblowers with expensive and baseless legal actions.

Why?

To punish anyone not aligned with the Establishment's agenda.

This is why I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides financial assistance to everyday Americans that have become the victims of the Deep State while EXPOSING the lies and corruption of our own government.

**And now the FBI has been caught SPYING on me during the Russiagate investigation. They issued subpoenas for my personal records without any lawful basis ...**

clean_body: | | | Peter, In the last few years, the Democrat party has shown us who they really are. They’re actively trying to rewrite America in their own woke image - and with such attacks on the greatest country on Earth, we have to act accordingly. I work for Josh Hawley because he’s not afraid to get tough on Democrats, or on the spineless politicians on both sides of the aisle that let them get away with what they’re doing to our great country. I’m not going to lie, it’s made him some enemies. But it’s worth it because he’s doing the right thing for America. Together, we can take back our great country from the radical Left, but it’s going to take every one of us doing our part. Thank you, Julia Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

McCarthy’s violent threats won’t go unchecked on my watch.

| Peter,

You know me. You've helped me. **You have my back — and I have yours.**

So it probably doesn't surprise you that when Kevin McCarthy threatened to fight me on the House Floor recently, I told him what I thought of him. And when he dared me to say it again, **I repeated what I thought of him.**

Look: These MAGA losers prefer violence over votes. They think you and I will back down. We won't. **Freedom and democracy is worth defending. I'll defend it every day.**

body:
Everyone will be looking at us.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=103%2E1163%2Eo6Myuw)
Hi team, we'll keep this quick since it's a holiday weekend!
On September 30, we're facing our next Federal Election Commission filing deadline. That means we have to report how much we've raised to run this campaign -- and everyone, from our opponents, to potential supporters, to the press will be watching to see if we've got what it takes to win and send Lateefah to Congress.
**[So if you can today, will you help us get a head start on our September fundraising goal by making a contribution?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230903-1?amount=10&refcode=em20230903-1&refcode2=103_1163_o6Myuw&akid=103%2E1163%2Eo6Myuw)**

name: Governor Greg Abbott
subject: Send Texas a thank you note, not a lawsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
Gov. Abbott's letter to Joe Biden

| |
---
| | | _**A note from the 48th Governor of Texas, Greg Abbott:**_

_Friend, Biden should send Texas a thank you note, not a lawsuit, for stepping up to secure the border in his absence. _

Biden has set a record for illegal immigration.

_**While he refuses to secure the border, Texas is doing HIS job to protect our state and our nation. **_
__If President Biden TRULY cared about public safety and human life, then he would ENFORCE federal immigration laws. __
Joe Biden is SUING Texas for taking HISTORIC action to SECURE THE BORDER, but Texas will fully utilize its sovereign authority to respond to the border crisis that Biden created.

Joe Biden's wide-open border policies have FAILED America and created a crisis at the border. The Biden Administration wants to PUNISH Texas for taking action, while they've IGNORED our country's most pressing issue.

Texas will NOT back down from the fight to secure the border. Our deployment of floating marine barriers in the Rio Grande River is just another step to respond to this crisis and secure our border.

Until President Biden FINALLY steps up to the plate and secures the border, _Texas will not stop._ But I need your help to keep up the fight to secure the border, Friend.

_**[I'm personally asking you today, if you can, please sign your name to show your support for Texas' historic border mission.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d37122a35b8d42a1a5079093c5070144&_e=GuZy7Jv_2j29yK9XPDhLJEybuq2uhROUGVN2jwJtUhM9VH3b9UGb1JbEqLYXu2BAptX6oHOlmlPQlGpCCHArxtoOywmGMdbDGm6dmWnz4cWNS7-OspFLpojJfLWA5al1bFnu-2x6dhvHkElKbrpie8_fNgJTcQ_KPjysHeg85Rwv4WTociTNIALCZcIDTywATJ57Nppzwl7ezMmTZxnrWXXAvvt6FzkU84d_ffwctiOFLLWaUVyY-WSdtS5BQ0NOXJTAWTZ2rLBItQZfF4ok0MSIDSr3VLuuI1ITIILXJL-a2mOjKUufwT2PIv0IsJM1n-EYGd2Bn_Qeioi73_-Lv6Y8qXnu-oLwsTDvvQ23Spa3cUxEh2548RlFpHEUGON-4QZ3sLwsIxdWxfoXf2QExwvu6ppdg42GxG2jhqejKAfPbUJYsvWo6AjDBY5Vv2pU "I’m personally asking you today, if you can, please sign your name to show your support for Texas’ historic border mission.")**_

Hi, Friend, it's Greg Abbott calling on your help today.

While Joe Biden has fallen asleep at the wheel and left our southern border wide open, Texas is HOLDING the line.

My team and I have made HISTORIC efforts to secure the border and protect our state from the influx of drugs, crime, and illegal activities that are surging across the border at unprecedented rates.

Texas is doing more than ANY OTHER state to respond to the border crisis Joe Biden created, but there is still more work to be done.

So I need YOUR help to keep up the fight.

_**[If you can, please chip in ANY AMOUNT to support Governor Abbott's historic fight to secure the border and push back against Joe Biden's FAILED border policies.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d37122a35b8d42a1a5079093c5070144&_e=GuZy7Jv_2j29yK9XPDhLJEybuq2uhROUGVN2jwJtUhM9VH3b9UGb1JbEqLYXu2BATdfUcNXtPZjQOrTcyBJ90tWCoG9koYzy12cdXCKgKuFRa7FUR5b1oCbzw8XyNFBbOdmrBvDx6VhhpkSDWeyvfzibsdPIbwg1Kkh1hT-hPwMCjV3cYBW3JZeYbgJwk4QMo8xgg_shaBAuAyRTUBn0FIQ-sTj2KBO57M_Fy6MVG0C1ZnhFR8jWWVOCLiJn40PP3mx93H8Xlsvv-IBm3Q_D42SPCZ0_K9jBvVTY-d1i6K8MNkULHcf6-ju016tPrvHIBJpJfqWsF8zDPZavhrkM9Fvm-3IqBrfZLajLfYrHUcz1R4tBplfYy5ZsrWpbMt8xyV7_HEw7sRVjJqsR7_9vywWkW8rumX2TbPRCI6DHxSwuTic-KpkW0AMLINq6VFB2 "If you can, please chip in ANY AMOUNT to support Governor Abbott’s historic fight to secure the border and push back against Joe Biden’s FAILED border policies. subject: 🔥 LAST CALL! DON'T MISS OUT! 🔥
body:
| | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d7a96e87f4&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | |
**SECOND & FINAL CALL!**

**Pre-Order Nov. 7th Abortion Amendment**
** **
**Car Signs & Bumper Stickers Now!**

---
|
IMPORTANT: When we undertook a similar effort for Issue 1 from the August 8th special election, we had many people who waited until the last minute to decide they wanted a car sign but we were sold out. Please help us by pre-ordering now. If you wait, it could be too late!

The Grassroots Freedom Initiative is taking-on progressive interests from outside Ohio on the November 7th ballot issue seeking to enshrine abortion, legalized prostitution, and gender transition without parental consent in the Ohio Constitution.

Our head-on approach is to augment yard sign efforts of political parties & issues groups with a groundswell of Ohioans who are fed up with the garbage being forced on us by progressives and elite, Uniparty, insiders of both major political parties in Ohio.

Below is a link where you can pre-order car door signs & bumper stickers in magnetic and/or re-stickable, non-damaging formats. The prices for these are within a few percent of cost. **_This is not a money-making project._**

We’re asking all grassroots Ohioans to participate. Please feel free to pass this along to people you know who might be interested.

Click **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7d9a9bd253&e=5c740fa3e2)** to order, or click on the images below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=91ba22b7bf&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Bumper Sticker Sample Art_

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=911d2e64d5&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Car Door Sign Sample Art_

* * *
---
|
---
| |
**Have you downloaded the "GFIconnect" App?**

---
|
Download our new app calle**d GFI _connect_**. It's available for both Google and Android and it's **FREE**.

Go **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=33d72d7d62&e=5c740fa3e2)** to download and install **GFI _connect_** , or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fb08750949&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3c017e12f5&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=407db74135&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|

|
---
| **How Can You Help GFI?**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=897246f292&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text (or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4a2f3cfc5b&e=5c740fa3e2)

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**

As a loyal supporter of my father, I’m reaching out on behalf of Senate Republicans _**[because they desperately need your help.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=478d73b641d74c248f87d3672e6eaac1&_e=Wh9g3LNSOggTEdQ2L-jNoW1VtLOaPS3MLo2rS7N_sKdCVXKrDMmfLqh8Qwcf9oh1Lu-FXj7_IXiwif2tDl0xvt11TA1vDdtkUtitEBOj-ylkVIlcKPHuUZJE4saaerY8U_-Z_HeyYWRhCwKGtQ2uJKiDCakNksvck4cnnd3OXFyaL2iB9xERaqOBOEFMJRnJgtEVrSLBDZ-60qJIMNN8dA1TG1AhOfw695FVKgky7wzc_oByALUdoEY4PnpwUItKY5egmghdtUPB5cWuVrfODGRKzHh_pkw_U_xKgOiUGu3vTb2f62H4dqMHunS9r-J7iZroMB0QhdLenFCjKtXCbIxTfz2uxGWNW9sH65UeMCQ6It8x4l41vsXy9D9JX8XIUNb72w3Zx3NmPqenjJH3zD2453CspTxgdr9UMsivkra2evRi2KMBZUvS0p9JaUA4q9Mm1-o4XjPCmL2FIocrvLQPOTzpd9slz2MALwG2s6M%3D)**__ _ After reviewing your donor profile, I believe you are the right person for this job. I’m asking for input.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=478d73b641d74c248f87d3672e6eaac1&_e=Wh9g3LNSOggTEdQ2L-jNoW1VtLOaPS3MLo2rS7N_sKdCVXKrDMmfLqh8Qwcf9oh1Lu-FXj7_IXiwif2tDl0xvt11TA1vDdtkUtitEBOj-ylkVIlcKPHuUZJE4saaerY8U_-Z_HeyYWRhCwKGtQ2uJKiDCakNksvck4cnnd3OXFyaL2iB9xERaqOBOEFMJRnJgtEVrSLBDZ-60qJIMNN8dA1TG1AhOfw695FVKgky7wzc_oByALUdoEY4PnpwUItKY5egmghdtUPB5cWuVrfODGRKzHh_pkw_U_xKgOiUGu3vTb2f62H4dqMHunS9r-J7Aey369qTOFrhtNxn_jTV9angX3UmJ9pZ7SqEDbpR1YcLEsK3gDsiDHKzXEhBkSR_yG5PuTrg5HcZpeJpwSP3HV7a8Wz5lpH5kp-Ox7AZUBzu-HcVasgHDdWUu4Hx4UTj6wbZhzMMAM0_Pf_LZ43BxoqNc_WJj3Q8X5PPNSr6B0E%3D)**

clean_body: Could you complete this crucial survey for me?| | | Peter, Don Jr. here. As a loyal supporter of my father, I’m reaching out on behalf of Senate Republicans After reviewing your donor profile, I believe you are the right person for this job. In Quarter 2, Democrats have raised an astronomical amount of money and it appears we are falling behind. Senate Republicans need your help strategizing their next steps. If we strategize correctly, then money won’t matter. I’ve put together a strategy survey that I need you to complete. Once you’re done, I’ll send it over to Senate Republicans. Thank you, | | | | | Donald Trump Jr. | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: I hate to be the bearer of bad news…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
But there’s a silver lining!

Hey Peter, I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but my campaign fell short of our end-of-month fundraising goal for August. This setback isn’t the outcome we were hoping for — Louisianans are heading to the polls in just a few weeks. At this stage, we were hoping to have the resources we need to build on our momentum from August, not cut back because we fell short. But as my finance director mentioned, there IS a silver lining: **We can still get back on track before our next filing deadline tomorrow!** **_[So please, take a moment to read Rose’s email below, then chip in $5 — or anything you can — to help us get our fundraising back on track before tomorrow’s filing **\----Original Message----**
**From:** Rose Huerta
**Date:** Sep 2, 2023
**Subject:** Not the news I wanted to deliver
> I’ll come right out and say it, Peter: Team Wilson fell short of its end-of-month fundraising goal. To be honest, this isn’t the news I wanted to deliver today. Falling short of these goals usually means cutting campaign expenses across the board, which is _not_ what we want to do with voters heading to the polls in just a few weeks. **But there is some good news:** We still have a chance to make up some lost ground before our huge filing deadline on Monday. If we can close the gap and hit our targets for the next three days, we’ll be right back on track heading into the final weeks of the primary! And look, I know we’ve asked for a lot of support lately, but we wouldn’t ask if we didn’t have to. Shawn is running a campaign for working Louisianans, and that’s exactly who he’s counting on to help him hit these campaign goals and win this high-stakes governor’s race. **_[We understand if you weren’t able to chip in before last month’s deadline, but we need your help now more than ever before. clean_body: But there’s a silver lining! Hey Peter, I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but my campaign fell short of our end-of-month fundraising goal for August. This setback isn’t the outcome we were hoping for — Louisianans are heading to the polls in just a few weeks. At this stage, we were hoping to have the resources we need to build on our momentum from August, not cut back because we fell short. But as my finance director mentioned, there IS a silver lining: We can still get back on track before our next filing deadline tomorrow! = = = Thanks so much, Shawn Wilson = \----Original Message---- From: Rose Huerta Date: Sep 2, 2023 Subject: Not the news I wanted to deliver I’ll come right out and say it, Peter: Team Wilson fell short of its end-of-month fundraising goal. To be honest, this isn’t the news I wanted to deliver today. Falling short of these goals usually means cutting campaign expenses across the board, which is not what we want to do with voters heading to the polls in just a few weeks. But there is some good news: We still have a chance to make up some lost ground before our huge filing deadline on Monday. If we can close the gap and hit our targets for the next three days, we’ll be right back on track heading into the final weeks of the primary! And look, I know we’ve asked for a lot of support lately, but we wouldn’t ask if we didn’t have to. Shawn is running a campaign for working Louisianans, and that’s exactly who he’s counting on to help him hit these campaign goals and win this high-stakes governor’s race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks so much, Rose Huerta Finance Director, Wilson for Louisiana = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Our email program is an important way to reach our valued supporters, and this email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Hi there – Patrick here, Sabina’s husband. I’m having a real déjà vu moment. **[In a moment, I’ll explain why – but first, primary Election Day is the day after tomorrow and Sabina’s counting on your support of $25 or whatever you can to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69148211/425254198/-93024851?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.09.03_B1_Patrick_30o_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTE2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWJmM2M0NS04NDRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c6DYfWte-fLTZiB4ZJZYN7t9VkHPmuYXWqiN7BDiTOE=)** Now that that’s out of the way, I want to tell you why I’ve been a supporter of Sabina’s since day one. We first met at a neighborhood association candidate forum where she was speaking about why she was running for City Council. I ended up volunteering for her campaign. Sabina and I went knocking on doors together, and the more we spoke with voters about her vision for the city, the more impressed I became with her.As we walked through the neighborhoods, talking to strangers (_sometimes having doors slammed in our faces_), I really fell for her. I knew I wanted to be a part of her journey as she continued to make a positive impact in the lives of Rhode Islanders. Today, I am prouder than ever to stand by her side as her husband and lifelong volunteer. I might be biased, but I can’t imagine a better person to send to Congress. **[Can I count on you to help Sabina reach as many voters as possible? We’ve set a goal of $2,000 for our Get Out the Vote Fundraising Drive, and any donation, even a dollar, can make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69148212/425254199/-93024851?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.09.03_B1_Patrick_30o_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTE2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWJmM2M0NS04NDRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c6DYfWte-fLTZiB4ZJZYN7t9VkHPmuYXWqiN7BDiTOE=)**

Fellow American - The DC Establishment is worried.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: We must be doing something right to make the DC Establishment so worried about our grassroots campaign. | | The top strategist for Ron DeSantis' super PAC privately told donors that Vivek Ramaswamy posed a threat to the Florida governor - and bragged that the super PAC was behind an avalanche of opposition research targeting the rival candidate. - Politico 9/3/23 Fellow American - The DC Establishment is worried. The chief strategist for the Ron DeSantis Super PAC was caught on tape privately telling donors that not only do I pose a "threat," but he is releasing "dirt" on me. These games are why people are fed up with career politicians and their advisors. That's why I am running a different type of campaign. Unlike my opponents, I don't have a Super PAC spending millions of dollars. This campaign is run from the bottom-up. To help us fight back against these smear-merchant attacks,I need to know you're in my corner, Fellow American. | | | ---|---|--- | | I will continue to speak the TRUTH, even when it's unpopular with the Establishment. Even if it makes me the number one target of DC insiders. Thanks for standing with me, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Friend, you've always had my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69159966/425261042/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4412-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk5ZTFjYS04YzRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkgd_EbpzlbZf220KpCoi6-XpFflo-FTZECQm4TFEo=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69159969/425261043/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4412-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk5ZTFjYS04YzRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkgd_EbpzlbZf220KpCoi6-XpFflo-FTZECQm4TFEo=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69159975/425261049/1575385346?refcode=jtk4412-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk5ZTFjYS04YzRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkgd_EbpzlbZf220KpCoi6-XpFflo-FTZECQm4TFEo=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69159976/425261050/1575385346?refcode=jtk4412-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk5ZTFjYS04YzRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkgd_EbpzlbZf220KpCoi6-XpFflo-FTZECQm4TFEo=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: NDRC Elections Update
subject: good news and bad news about the fight for House control:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, the 2024 election is already underway – and we have good news and bad news about the fight for control of the House of Representatives.

**First, the good news:** Our movement won a major victory when the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s gerrymandered map for violating the Voting Rights Act.

Now, states across the country could be required to draw new, fair maps before the next election – **and according to _FiveThirtyEight_ , “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”**

**But here’s the bad news:** _POLITICO_ reported that “The battle for the House is currently dominated by GOP fundraising.” **_That means MAGA Republicans are getting a head start!_**

[**_Team, we have a real shot at securing a level playing field in the battle for House control in 2024 – but we’re already falling behind. Will you make an urgent donation now to help power the NDRC’s fight for fairness across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69161760/425261607/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230903_FR_9B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0OWQ2MjJjLThlNGEtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TdYjujfVtljXOku-YR5n9hxaeaOzXWGNnQdPeKmKQHU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

By fighting to protect fair maps, prevent GOP gerrymandering, and propel fair redistricting, we can maximize our chances of flipping the House blue in 2024. _But we’re counting on our grassroots supporters to help us make it happen!_

clean_body: | Team, the 2024 election is already underway – and we have good news and bad news about the fight for control of the House of Representatives. First, the good news: Our movement won a major victory when the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s gerrymandered map for violating the Voting Rights Act. Now, states across the country could be required to draw new, fair maps before the next election – and according to FiveThirtyEight , “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.” But here’s the bad news: POLITICO reported that “The battle for the House is currently dominated by GOP fundraising.” That means MAGA Republicans are getting a head start! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Remember, A.G. Holder has often said, "Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” By fighting to protect fair maps, prevent GOP gerrymandering, and propel fair redistricting, we can maximize our chances of flipping the House blue in 2024. But we’re counting on our grassroots supporters to help us make it happen! = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Team Brandon
subject: This is how we outsmart Tate Reeves.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Join the strategy brainstorm → | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69162874/425262092/17860314?refcode=ea.4417eb48-904a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4417eb48-904a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQxN2ViNDgtOTA0YS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qhPJFohbzcbWdQaKvrzMuNC92s44Y8hku7mWNd7VusI=)
---
Peter, with nearly two months until the election, it’s going to take ALL hands on deck and a solid strategy to beat Tate Reeves. Every move matters, and every vote counts.

Even one slip could cost us dearly.

**That's why we’re reaching out to you, Peter.**

As one of our top supporters, your input is crucial. [Do you have two minutes to complete our exclusive campaign strategy survey? It would mean the world to Brandon to receive your input directly >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69162875/425262093/833059848?refcode=ea.4417eb48-904a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4417eb48-904a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQxN2ViNDgtOTA0YS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qhPJFohbzcbWdQaKvrzMuNC92s44Y8hku7mWNd7VusI=&emci=5b357f4d-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4417eb48-904a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)

Our goal is simple: get Brandon in front of as many Mississippi voters as possible before November 7th. In order to do that, we need to make some BIG decisions on how to best use our resources.

Your thoughts will help us make these tough calls.

This election isn't business as usual. It’s an opportunity for Mississippi to stop the never-ending corruption scandals and lousy leadership from Tate Reeves and his cronies.

But it’s going to take some serious strategy and hard work to win this election.

subject: Tell Republicans: We will not work until we die
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Before Social Security was enacted 88 years ago, 50% of seniors lived in poverty. | |
---
Peter, Did you know that the life expectancy for Black people in the U.S. is just 70 years old, nearly 6 years less than white folks? For Native people it’s even worse -- more than 10 years less.[1] At a time when fewer and fewer corporations are offering workers guaranteed pensions in retirement, future generations are likely to become more dependent on Social Security to maintain a basic standard of living. So, what is Republicans’ solution to keeping Social Security strong for current and future generations? Raise the retirement age and cut benefits. Already, the Social Security retirement age has been raised to 67 years old. **Raising it even further would mean that millions of people who have paid into Social Security their entire working lives would never be able to retire or see a single Social Security check.** [**This Labor Day weekend, tell Republicans that we will not work until we die. Sign now to say we will NOT raise the Social Security retirement age.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7Tnqk9es_044PWbJQlefyUfw9Mj9B2WkWxwzovrVyzcU2lUzUHRkzPUrysaw9I4Ft4Za4mnvy7RnLjACEiqqeEinFwbKCEQrGWN0EfSn14ESGdTppesI8NJO3zCgvPTQ702FloYTfUwkPNJj9mgfq9iwCv0jhh0FjCkAVk89Tc_Sh01XYpNekAtwNAcib_xL0gtxSV711pZrZNkCXMOBXhDkVyos7DhDrmRojd1VxgIjqQHP9lgbcbzQCBkg8121aYNnXloCR4g3I_Q1iGeJDvhhwlj53O3CLZfYY4OJ7096WFvG4TEek3JfFrDdIzsyMI7gpO5tEivaEcA7wV0jDSj3I01bFeXPl9Usx2k6hKs56iYHRTV529dnkhYQLALBCB_V9LZhMZsitI9MlTqbLeYoXts-ungsPxYJmlYSmCc9UXp7HLfa-GCTf5I0WqXCjhiVM/3za/Kz5SC6_5RSq2t6PAUuimTg/h0/9ON606u5ly6VsUCR78TcwIpXZqlqIgCfiAf2x2ZQNpI)**** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnVkA741L0tb6661i1rmNCuTFhCUxSEzwk46uey-di-ZygnO_2eklmsHy0Hse7Tnqk9es_044PWbJQlefyUfw9Mj9B2WkWxwzovrVyzcU2lUzUHRkzPUrysaw9I4Ft4Za4mnvy7RnLjACEiqqeEinFwbKCEQrGWN0EfSn14ESGdTppesI8NJO3zCgvPTQ702FloYTfUwkPNJj9mgfq9iwCv0jhh0FjCkAVk89Tc_Sh01XYpNekAtwNAcib_xL0gtxSV711pZrZNkCXMOBXhDkVy-lmTiQzqkbHDGTl0nOla9HrX3aBYxizJitcRNTm3eM2-ePbz9ZeTdjYhHiLgXpUPfOxF7eBPYCAnXEUHCMbqQBAvzYDLCRRQxW3S_vhgHNQkZPOurLz-3Fx-erbhH3LB8LkgewiRgXtNgOXctYezqwRDbPbCltGGZgbGpbnpQsNyyK716bOv9uXhMh8YzC89jXZ0svYxZYrtK5KSCAm1IDA62ui2cgpG9H9eLi0voHY/3za/Kz5SC6_5RSq2t6PAUuimTg/h1/jkRCKIFUI_nB8ZYTnW4tOL-cV47q4_q0lhjOT0-WX5o) ** Nearly 65 million people rely on Social Security benefits each year, including 131,000 in Cori’s home state of Missouri. They’re relying on a fully funded Social Security program. **That’s why, instead of cutting benefits, Cori is working to protect and expand Social Security by asking upper income earners to pay their fair share.** But, instead of making their wealthy donors contribute anything more to Social Security, Republicans want to cut benefits and make low-wage earners and working people accept less. Today, that number is less than 10% -- still too high, but a major improvement. **Social Security is a lifesaving program and we need to ensure it’s here to stay.** Thank you for taking action today. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
Hi Peter, Tammy told me I should reach out. Before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. **I’ll be honest with you, Peter:** Over the years, in Ohio, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. **Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for _you_. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. [Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin’s – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)** Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” **That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking:** **[Will you please split $10 between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin’s to help us hit our midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-brown.FKI63x&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
---
[SPLIT $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-brown.OqIXHR&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
---
| [SPLIT $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-brown.ucgdKC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
---
[SPLIT $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-brown.5MeF_F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
---
| [SPLIT $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-brown.PNY5JG&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
---
[SPLIT ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)
---
This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.
With gratitude,
Sherrod
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1099%2E35263%2EnYWYVj)**

Hey, Friend.

I'm sending over a _brief message_ to discuss the measures my colleagues and I are taking to hold the Biden administration accountable for putting the security of our nation at risk.

**[**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE
>> PITCH IN $25 HERE <<**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=cb38974f4cd5458bb0a511b443a7266d&_e=reTZaojgHnmSoxzVh8MtJqS3CnqfJLT4uaCJadHBbjIBvY8RvW-EWvJsleE6DrrAlFBZ2Kt0zKOTBO9i1zDC3IeEyeE300EwC-ScYMlXd9H0M_A_cXnLFeb3jFxptnMMQvy6ds3kTgWbpB4XLSPbJhDpukoe0k8hM4mu3t4octHL2B_ESF6ZU00bl9hJWEiguUo3G_vZ57xOWHtZUVN9vspNV53O4jNlCfYUZL6SFmyTCLZLSN6SPEaEgJy7lJ8FKj-MEylX5Mt-kZN2O9c3FrzKMlnknBGOWjzeub0iwpgrZsqYvg5lmWJDX7MFKcmwn36NDaP548zdIxe-TLKEhw%3D%3D)**
It is the solemn duty of any Elected Official to protect the safety of their constituents. Secretary Mayorkas has played politics with our border security for too long, and Americans have paid the price. **House Republicans have no choice but to impeach Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.**

**[**> > HOLD BIDEN AND MAYORKAS ACCOUNTABLE <<**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=cb38974f4cd5458bb0a511b443a7266d&_e=reTZaojgHnmSoxzVh8MtJqS3CnqfJLT4uaCJadHBbjIBvY8RvW-EWvJsleE6DrrAlFBZ2Kt0zKOTBO9i1zDC3IeEyeE300EwC-ScYMlXd9H0M_A_cXnLFeb3jFxptnMMQvy6ds3kTgWbpB4XLSPbJhDpukoe0k8hM4mu3t4octHkG4Q64x98S3WWu694c3KOc8mlUJuUEWMaWXc9wwmn6kw-yHozfOC_aijJmg4d4qJ1zry4QOzaxqZDgfc1PAljLXn8XBbguBLVHIi9sxKwxxnr9Kk6vkgQ7Ty_2B7ijQE2Ig91iKP9ndz4EQ0ChaURj1m00M2DgpxFZdRfKfCpQg%3D%3D)**

**$13.27.** That was our average online donation last month, Peter. $13.27 may seem small to the billionaires and super PACs that prop up so many of our elected officials. And it’s pocket change to the corporate special interest groups who pay to ensure their CEOs keep their tax loopholes and huge salaries. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Don’t let the 2 newborn baby orcas starve to death
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964078?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Look, Friend, we don’t want to sound pessimistic because we are thrilled about the births of the two newborn orca calves in the Southern Resident killer whale pod. But if we’re being honest, we’re worried. _**69%**_ of orca pregnancies end in miscarriage, and the mortality rate for newborn orcas is **as high as 50%**. In fact, it’s so common that these babies don’t survive, scientists don’t even name them until they have survived at least a year. And right now, these endangered whales are already hanging on by a thread. On top of ocean acidification, global warming, and pollution, orcas are facing **STARVATION and MALNUTRITION** because corporate overfishing and bycatch is depleting Chinook salmon populations that these beloved whales depend on for food. If the two newborn Southern Resident orca calves are going to make it through their first year, we urgently need to restore their critical food source. _**That’s why we’re calling on the National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS) to rein in greedy industrial fishing companies immediately**_ — but we need your help if we’re going to apply enough public pressure. [**Will you help ensure the survival of the two newborn orca calves by signing our petition by 11:59 P.M. tonight?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964079?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964080?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Before industrial overfishing and bycatch contributed to the loss of _**159**_ salmon populations, the Pacific Northwest waters were once flowing with abundant food for orcas.
Now, after the loss of almost HALF of the historic salmon runs, these endangered whales are struggling to survive. In fact, the Southern Resident orca population is currently at its _**LOWEST**_ point since the 1970’s, and experts predict that these beloved sea animals could be **_EXTINCT_ within the next few decades.**
But there’s still hope, Friend. When activists like you speak up on these critical issues, federal agencies like NMFS take notice. So today, we’re asking for your voice to urge NMFS to hold greedy fishing corporations accountable so that the two newborn Southern Resident orcas have a _**fighting chance at survival.**_ [**Please don’t let them starve to death before their lives have even begun. Sign the petition now while there’s still time left >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964081?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964080?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for helping save endangered orcas,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
it’s been a month since I heard from you...
| Hi, it’s Heather from VPP! **I reached out to you last month and I’m really worried because I haven't heard back from you...

** You began to make a donation to secure your Biden Supporter Membership, but unfortunately you never finished... | [**CHIP IN $7 NOW TO FINISH YOUR PRESIDENT BIDEN MEMBERSHIP SIGN UP PROCESS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52382?t=6&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52383?t=7&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)
If you fail to respond again, we’re going to be _forced_ to put you on the President Biden non-supporter list.

_And we DO NOT want that information to be funneled up to the big bosses (President Biden and VP Harris) if it’s incorrect!_

**So now that it’s September, I wanted to give you the chance to give us a clear answer of whether or not you support President Biden.**

[**You only have 5 minutes to secure your spot on the list of President Biden supporters, so please act fast! Chip in $7 now to renew your President Biden membership for September!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52383?t=8&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)
[**Chip in $7 now to renew your President Biden Membership »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52382?t=9&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)
---
Thanks for stepping up,

Heather
Executive Director
Voter Protection Project
_FWD:
\----------------_
Hi friend, it’s Heather from Team VPP!

I’m touching base because you started to make a donation to become a Biden Supporter Member, **but unfortunately didn’t complete the process.**

Securing your spot as a member is the best way we can demonstrate _massive grassroots strength_ for President Biden — and prevent a MAGA takeover in the White House.

_Our country and our democracy simply can’t afford 4 more years of Donald Trump._ So I hope you’ll join us in this fight before time runs out!

[**Our deadline expires in just 5 hours: Please, will you finish the donation you started and chip in $7 right now to activate your Biden Supporter Membership? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52383?t=10&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52383?t=11&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52384?t=12&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)

Counting on you,

Heather
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10279%2E878179%2EfXbdSd)

subject: Senate Republicans asked me which grassroots supporter should represent your state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I selected YOU | Fellow American,

As a former Speaker of the House, I know a thing or two about winning elections.

In order to [**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c5d19ca804274ee7ace42e7dad0a448c&_e=bUDp74KY5zXLBM6Iv4iTLlMCkvvr5RzNd4O9sEQITVmq7K1bA31djwm0A8R6dQOo7OTSIJQMjgrrVNQqp2nxP3V1PqvTsOhYDcORD3odktMQgOE2jgxON7AI9G6ejvvUfF2GVE9MQcvmCQ9Yhy0tjBll2R1fDxPss6a5FCB-kn5WfaYqdmDDCofzaQfo5DtPjkRSeWB7A9AI6Ncmmp6_J2Ml36gcZfEasoXWcV8xa_O1w2kNOltEu2dF0SnyXWGimWvzY1k1TubAqob91eJSb9Q4-BVBg3UGlM4p5bnAFh2WAIDVFOnQJR_XmkvbECoeoZ89R9BI3CFvFccwiydEJEaHZFXSz_oL4VL-0ArqOgzFRZlhrBgMIPoLNl-detcu71k7DG9JKXLVfiRa1SZAWQbcYUntCPDbntYloTmWtp268Lk-sIVRYwxIH80mZ6hn) from Joe Biden and his far-Left cronies in the Senate next year, the Republican Party needs YOUR HELP to craft our winning message. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelly=20Cooper?=
subject: Meet the REAL Greg Stanton
body:
| | | | | | | | | | Not the one he plays on TV...
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=1354d57f54&e=84ee529f47)
---
---
You’ve probably heard the saying, friend. _**If it walks like a duck, and quacks like a duck... It’s probably a duck!**_ Greg Stanton would have you believe that he’s “Mr. Bipartisan” – always willing to find middle ground between Republicans and Democrats... In reality, Swampy Stanton represents the _**ABSOLUTE - WORST - CHARACTERISTICS**_ of the Radical Left. _**He votes with AOC**_ __**95**__ _**% of the time...**_ _**He flaunts his support from organizations that advocate**_ __**Defunding the Police**__ _**and**_ __**Abortion Up Until Birth**__ _**...**_ _**He proudly patronizes local businesses widely known for hosting**_ __**Drag Queen Story Hour**__ _**...**_ _**Swampy Stanton is NOT the man he claims to be...**_ Kelly Cooper, on the other hand, is a proud Marine Veteran, small business owner, community leader, husband, and father. He will restore _**HONOR**_ and _**RESPECT**_ to Arizona’s 4th Congressional District office, and he will _**NEVER**_ turn his back on our courageous first responders. Will you help us send _**Swampy Greg Stanton**_ a message that Arizona’s watching, and we see his true colors?
---
---
| [SEND SWAMPY STANTON A MESSAGE >>](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=6761e7f716&e=84ee529f47)

For Arizona, Team Cooper

---
| | | |
---|---|---|---
Raised by a single mom, Kelly understands the importance of education and the sacrifices parents make. After serving in the United States Marine Corps from 1993 to 1997, Kelly gained global experience and interpersonal skills during deployments to Cuba, Japan, South Korea, and a South American tour. Transitioning to civilian life, he excelled in the restaurant industry, managing multiple establishments before becoming the owner of two Melting Pot Franchises and his own concept, BKD's Backyard Joint in Chandler. As the founder and chairman of the Maricopa County Republican Veterans Club, Kelly collaborates with community groups, using his businesses for fundraising and identifying community needs
---

name: Sarah McBride
subject: 📸 Sharing some of my August photos with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164377/425267504/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=)
---
Before the long weekend ends, I wanted to reach out and share some updates from the last few weeks on the campaign trail! We’ve been all across the state. And more often than not, I hear from Delawareans that they want our government to focus on real, meaningful change: Reducing gun violence, affordable child care, and improving the economy. To kick off August, I joined the governor and fellow legislators for the signing of **an historic package of environmental bills** — including my legislation requiring new homes to be built with basic infrastructuring for low-cost installation of EV chargers and codifying Delaware’s EV rebate program. Delaware is the lowest lying state and we must do all we can to combat climate change. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164378/425267505/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=) We launched our campaign’s canvassing events in Wilmington and **more than 50 volunteers (!!!) braved the heat and rain** to knock on doors and have conversations with voters. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164379/425267506/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=) **On August 18, I was proud to join fellow legislators and the governor as he signed my and Rep. Schwartzkopf’s bill to make Delaware schools gun free zones.** It was an honor to join gun violence prevention advocates as this critical piece of legislation was signed into law. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164380/425267507/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=) Last weekend, I spent some time in Milton. On Saturday, I met up with my colleague and friend Sen. Russ Huxtable for Milton’s Bargains on the Broadkill. **That same weekend, I was joined by nearly two dozen volunteers to knock on hundreds of doors across Milton!** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164381/425267508/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=)** To close out the month on the road, **we stopped at August Quarterly, the longest-running African American religious festival in the country held right here in Wilmington.** August Quarterly is a celebration of religious freedom and pluralism, freedom of speech, and the right to assemble — all foundations of a diverse democracy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164382/425267509/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=) **Over the next month we’ll continue to canvass up and down the state to hear from more Delawareans.** So, I just want to say thank you for making all those miles on the road possible with your support! I know we (and a lot of other campaigns!) ask for it a lot, and that’s why I am so grateful that you put your trust and your hard-earned dollars towards our grassroots campaign. Have a great holiday weekend. — Sarah | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69164383/425267510/1846669455?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230903_na_roundup_cand_nc_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkwMzI4NS1hNTRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoBboQ-06LAt9PRH8mn7XMB36m__78I6HRXg7tPsAy8=)
---

| Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. clean_body: | = Before the long weekend ends, I wanted to reach out and share some updates from the last few weeks on the campaign trail! We’ve been all across the state. And more often than not, I hear from Delawareans that they want our government to focus on real, meaningful change: Reducing gun violence, affordable child care, and improving the economy. To kick off August, I joined the governor and fellow legislators for the signing of an historic package of environmental bills — including my legislation requiring new homes to be built with basic infrastructuring for low-cost installation of EV chargers and codifying Delaware’s EV rebate program. Delaware is the lowest lying state and we must do all we can to combat climate change. = We launched our campaign’s canvassing events in Wilmington and more than 50 volunteers (!!!) braved the heat and rain to knock on doors and have conversations with voters. = On August 18, I was proud to join fellow legislators and the governor as he signed my and Rep. Schwartzkopf’s bill to make Delaware schools gun free zones. It was an honor to join gun violence prevention advocates as this critical piece of legislation was signed into law. = Last weekend, I spent some time in Milton. On Saturday, I met up with my colleague and friend Sen. Russ Huxtable for Milton’s Bargains on the Broadkill. That same weekend, I was joined by nearly two dozen volunteers to knock on hundreds of doors across Milton! = To close out the month on the road, we stopped at August Quarterly, the longest-running African American religious festival in the country held right here in Wilmington. August Quarterly is a celebration of religious freedom and pluralism, freedom of speech, and the right to assemble — all foundations of a diverse democracy. = Over the next month we’ll continue to canvass up and down the state to hear from more Delawareans. So, I just want to say thank you for making all those miles on the road possible with your support! I know we (and a lot of other campaigns!) ask for it a lot, and that’s why I am so grateful that you put your trust and your hard-earned dollars towards our grassroots campaign. Have a great holiday weekend. — Sarah | = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. Box 1904 Wilmington, DE 19899 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Did you see what Tim Kaine said about me?!

| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ea33920b49824385987f66f91ca2a998&_e=n1UVmrnm1GV8f0fNsqLidPsjk749U_awC74vHnpDqouwy3278Vpx7XGTJfXO-rQ3NaVAZawY_fYdTXeOLgT_GtxCOyQxSzLgQg8VrQM8XyewDZ_vP1He2bQxqBDRFp-sU1qervDJs0rAEM5ECGqBZd84iKgSI9aYPRUNYm7z9Zz6rMOVdh5t5o2QnD3g__eD8wyoz-WxPbPshiiBmcipTdK4dLyHA9bBiM45HtFgM2aUiZIVYYOmQqGomFYxr_4_UPekZREA4aNut7urkD9bxT2T1nPkHuzOH2PSS68qjrFSeZSK_-k-UWoTpYzmtTeEeTWPsthcSafsC5fvpApjgaArtO_DyoQDXcVxblQJqAUhidbSKHqurgBVizDMIn68ut1KensJgFIJaG6QLPh_RA%3D%3D)

Friend, I served our country for over 25 years on the frontlines risking my life to protect people like Tim Kaine who sit in office and dictate our lives – poorly might I add. But now, Tim Kaine is questioning my motive to serve our country, and I’m offended by it. This week, Tim Kaine released an email saying that I would “make our country less safe” hoping to rack in some extra cash for his campaign. First of all, I have seen firsthand what wars do. I have watched as my brother and sisters have fallen on the battlefield. So, for Tim Kaine, someone who has NEVER served in our military, to accuse me of potentially putting Americans in harm's way is ABSURED and WRONG. Not to mention, just yesterday he was advocating to put American boots on the ground in a foreign country. This is a perfect example of the BROKE and TWO-FACED politician Tim Kaine is. **But it’s also a sign that he is worried I will defeat him in 2024.** Unfortunately, these lies are gaining Tim Kaine and his campaign momentum, and I need your help to push back. _**[This is a crucial point in this race, and I won’t back down to his political games. Can you support me against Hillary Clinton and Joe Biden’s puppet?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ea33920b49824385987f66f91ca2a998&_e=n1UVmrnm1GV8f0fNsqLidPsjk749U_awC74vHnpDqouwy3278Vpx7XGTJfXO-rQ3NaVAZawY_fYdTXeOLgT_GtxCOyQxSzLgQg8VrQM8XyewDZ_vP1He2bQxqBDRFp-sU1qervDJs0rAEM5ECGqBZd84iKgSI9aYPRUNYm7z9Zz6rMOVdh5t5o2QnD3g__eD8wyoz-WxPbPshiiBmcipTdK4dLyHA9bBiM45HtFgM2aUiZIVYYOmQqGomFYxr_4_mJ9A_iMsSg7v17mGqTc-3drTUlEAzI91VSWmzAPNdclwqsvFQ6vfMfsq7FqxkSBbKFJe84xYtB2CEQckGpsxx41I7EjglO0wx8QsamjGR0IkXUXR0WfuRIzCf1HjOskw7ebRDQz7cbEPN7BhhOzATw%3D%3D)**_ **The gloves are off, and I’m ready to _WIN_.**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Take a look at my five plans that will root corruption out of Washington, and let me know if you endorse them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Every signature is another signal that the American people are demanding real change and calling for a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=40%2E4032634%2EOAKNz1)
---
Here's the way I see it: The American people should have complete confidence that government officials are making decisions with only one factor in mind: the public interest. Not their own pocketbooks. Not their future job prospects in the private sector. Not the wishes of big donors and giant corporations. The public interest. [**So I’ve got a whole bunch of plans to root corruption out of Washington. Please take a look below and click here to let me know if you endorse these plans. Every signature is another signal that the American people are demanding real change and calling for a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-anti-corruption-plans/?source=EMZ16H_COR_E_20230903_V1S1_AK_F13&t=8&akid=40%2E4032634%2EOAKNz1) | [**I ENDORSE**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-anti-corruption-plans/?source=EMZ16H_COR_E_20230903_V1S1_AK_F13&t=9&akid=40%2E4032634%2EOAKNz1)
---
Some are more specific, like my **Department of Defense Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act** , which would limit the influence of contractors on the military, constrain foreign influence on retired senior military officers, and require greater transparency from contractors in their interactions with the Pentagon.
Or my **Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act** , which would strengthen ethical standards up and down our judiciary, impose an enforceable code of conduct on the Supreme Court, and ban federal judges from owning individual stock.
Or my **Presidential Conflicts of Interest Act** , which would require the president and vice president to disclose and divest from any potential financial conflicts of interest. That’s a standard that President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have already cleared — and that all their successors should be held to. Especially after we saw Donald Trump run the most corrupt administration in modern history.
Or my **bipartisan legislation to reform the Federal Reserve** , which would bar big bank executives from serving on Reserve Bank boards of directors, subject directors to ethics and financial conflict of interest rules, and bring increased transparency and accountability to the Fed.
And then I’ve got my big plan: the **Anti-Corruption and Public Integrity Act**. It’s the most sweeping set of reforms since Watergate. And it would fundamentally change the way Washington does business, including...
* Banning all individual stock ownership by members of Congress, Cabinet secretaries, senior congressional staff, federal judges, White House staff, and other senior agency officials while in office.
* Prohibiting all federal officials from holding or trading stock if its value might be influenced by their agency, department, or actions.
* Tightening conflict of interest and recusal requirements.
* Padlocking the revolving door between industry and government.
* Creating a new, independent anti-corruption agency dedicated to enforcing federal ethics laws.
* Expanding an independent and empowered Congressional ethics office.

All of these plans have two things in common. They’re about putting our government on the side of the people — not the powerful special interests. And they’re only possible if we grow and strengthen our grassroots movement. That’s how we beat Big Money.
[**I’m running for re-election so we can root corruption out of Washington, rebuild our middle class, and strengthen our democracy. But I can’t do it alone. So please let me know here if you're with me in this fight by adding your name to endorse these plans.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-anti-corruption-plans/?source=EMZ16H_COR_E_20230903_V1S1_AK_F13&t=10&akid=40%2E4032634%2EOAKNz1)
I’m deeply grateful to fight by your side.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
P.S. Do you have any feedback on this plan or for our campaign in general? [**Please share with me here. I appreciate hearing your thoughts.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-share-your-feedback/?source=EMZ16H_COR_E_20230903_V1S1_AK_F13&t=11&akid=40%2E4032634%2EOAKNz1)

---
| | | |
---

---

body:
Secure your spot by purchasing a ticket today | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12649012?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ffb6ede7e6&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Our mission to protect our youth’s sports and spaces is ongoing. The success of our efforts hinge upon your voice and engagement in this fight to protect our children from the Radical Left agenda.

Mark your calendars for Thursday, September 21st, as we gather for the NEGOP 'Sports & Spaces' Roundtable. Senator Kathleen Kauth will lead the conversation, highlighting the importance of rallying our efforts for a second push behind [LB 575](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=26c931f5ca&e=25844e23a8), – the Sports and Spaces Act.

During the roundtable, we'll delve into the critical need to safeguard our youth's spaces, including locker rooms, bathrooms, and sports teams. It's a discussion that's pivotal for the well-being of our children.
**Email[admin@ne.gop](mailto:admin@ne.gop) today for information on purchasing tickets!**
---
| [ ](mailto:admin@ne.gop)
---
| Interested in joining us? Feel free to reach out to [admin@ne.gop](mailto:admin@ne.gop) for all the details you need to secure your spot!

**_Tickets are available for purchase_ :**

**Single admission** : $40
**Student tickets** : $25
**Sponsorship opportunities** : $500, $1000, and $1500

We look forward to bringing together all child advocates dedicated to the cause of caring for our children by fighting to ensure they have an exceptional educational environment. I hope to see you there!

Warm regards,

Dawn Liphardt
Executive Director
Republican Party of Nebraska

[**P.S. In case your schedule prevents your attendance, but you still wish to contribute to our mission of safeguarding our children from the Radical Left agenda, your generous donations are greatly appreciated. Please consider making a contribution using the link below:**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=88ba43bd13&e=25844e23a8)

Hello,
Before the 2022 election, Washington didn’t give my husband Adam a chance against Lauren Boebert.
But Adam drove over 24,000 miles, meeting thousands of voters across Colorado’s 3rd congressional district – often with our son, Felix.
**Ultimately, though, we lacked the resources and lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by _just 546 votes_.** It was the closest congressional race in the _entire_ country.
**We need to raise another $75,000 for Adam’s campaign this weekend to ensure that, this time, we _do_ have the resources to take on Boebert and win – but right now we're still $12,655 short, and we need your help:**
