clean_body: Before the 2022 election, Washington didn’t give my husband Adam a chance against Lauren Boebert. But Adam drove over 24,000 miles, meeting thousands of voters across Colorado’s 3rd congressional district – often with our son, Felix. Hello, Before the 2022 election, Washington didn’t give my husband Adam a chance against Lauren Boebert. But Adam drove over 24,000 miles, meeting thousands of voters across Colorado’s 3rd congressional district – often with our son, Felix. Ultimately, though, we lacked the resources and lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes. It was the closest congressional race in the entire country. We need to raise another $75,000 for Adam’s campaign this weekend to ensure that, this time, we do have the resources to take on Boebert and win – but right now we're still $12,655 short, and we need your help: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Marjorie Taylor Greene... Will you take a few minutes to share your priorities? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69165104/425270319/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM2ZTU0My1hZjRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEOLPuJ6JwkLu9cOzEghhzF16W9rpUYPnmzHWuzn_7I=&emci=d6d734a3-0249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc6e543-af4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

I wanted to share a bit about what I’ve been up to in New Mexico lately. My priorities are always grounded in New Mexico values. That’s why I’ve spent time this summer meeting with leaders across the state, and lifting up strong local candidates who serve as critical partners to the work I’m doing in Washington. Soon, I’ll head back to the Senate, where I’ll continue working to make progress alongside our Democratic Majority. **[I’m hoping to hear from you about what issues you’d like us to tackle next. Will you share your thoughts by taking my September Priorities Survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69165105/425270320/2082230303?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM2ZTU0My1hZjRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEOLPuJ6JwkLu9cOzEghhzF16W9rpUYPnmzHWuzn_7I=&emci=d6d734a3-0249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc6e543-af4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69165106/425270321/2082230303?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM2ZTU0My1hZjRhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEOLPuJ6JwkLu9cOzEghhzF16W9rpUYPnmzHWuzn_7I=&emci=d6d734a3-0249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc6e543-af4a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s latest approval ratings.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s the most unpopular Republican running for re-election in 2024 — and we have a real opportunity to defeat him.
#
Peter,
_Yet another_ new poll just found that Josh Hawley is deeply unpopular among Missouri voters. **Please let us explain what this means for our grassroots movement.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36226?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36226?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)**
On January 6th, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world who he really is — just a fraud and a coward who raises his fist when he thinks it’ll help his personal ambitions, then runs away the second things get real. And since then, he’s become the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024. **Here’s what happened:**
**FIRST:** Some of Hawley’s top supporters announced they’re refusing to support his re-election campaign this cycle — including his former mentor, three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, who said supporting Hawley in 2018 was _“one of the worst mistakes he’s ever made in his life.”_
**THEN:** A devastating new report from _Morning Consult_ showed Josh Hawley has the lowest approval of any Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024 — even worse than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida!
**AND NOW:** More than a year out from Election Day, GOP mega-donors and corporate elites are dumping millions of dollars into our race, hoping it will be enough to tear down 13-year Marine veteran Lucas Kunce and prop up Hawley’s flailing campaign.
**So we have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year, but it’s not going to be easy —[and we need your help to get it done.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36226?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36226?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)**
In July — when FEC reports showed Lucas had outraised Hawley’s campaign for the first six months of 2023 — we learned that a group of GOP insiders put over $1 MILLION into a brand new Super PAC to support Hawley and attack Lucas.
And over the coming months, they’re only going to spend EVEN MORE if it means keeping this Senate seat under their thumb. **That means if we’re going to have the resources to combat their attacks AND put Lucas’ positive vision in front of Missouri voters, we urgently need your help, Peter.**
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward our grassroots campaign today? Our best shot at building a winning campaign is keeping up our record-breaking momentum — and your support is the only thing that makes that possible.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36226?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36227?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36227?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36227?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36227?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36227?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36227?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36226?refcode=em20230903-3686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)

Thank you,
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230903-3686-footer&t=13&refcode2=3686_614464_NZCcVx&akid=3686%2E614464%2ENZCcVx)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: imagine, a "Blue Idaho"
body:
\- - -> (don't wait til the AM to read this)... |
---
| | Take a look at this photo...

A Canyon County Precinct Committeeman named Dominic Brandon held that up while testifying against the socialist "Idaho Launch" in one of my committees earlier this year.

Now, I want you to imagine, for a moment...

An Idaho infiltrated by ideologies that strangle our freedoms and undermine our values.

Picture your kids growing up in "Blue Idaho" where their individual liberties aren't just challenged but choked out...

Where your entrepreneurial spirit is crushed under the weight of stifling regulations and high taxes...

Where your medical choices are dictated by faceless bureaucrats, stripping you of the right to control what you inject into your own body or put on your face...

Terrifying, isn't it?

No need to imagine though...**_ it's happening right now. _**

Even more horrifying is the realization that those leading us down this dark path wear the masks of conservative Republicans. The way I see it, they're wolves in sheep's clothing, pouring resources into campaigns that aim to unseat those of us who truly stand for Idaho's values.

If you remember, I stepped into this arena vowing to uphold medical freedom, educational choice, and financial independence.

And unlike my predecessor—who, I hate to say, was an active obstacle against these very ideals—I've kept my word.

✅ I've penned legislation that keeps Child Protective Services from questioning your parental choices regarding vaccinations—and it passed

✅ I've championed school choice, and helped secure better funding avenues for charter schools

✅ I've fought like hell against irresponsible spending, rejecting the seductive but toxic allure of federal dollars

(While on all of those things, my predecessor didn't just drop the ball—he kicked it into the enemy's court, working against everything we've fought so hard to protect)

**The battle lines are drawn...**

On one side are those of us who love liberty, and respect the sanctity of individual choice.

On the other are not just liberal ideologues but camouflaged conservatives who are just as eager to surrender our state to federal mandates and socialist doctrines.

With regard to the next election... _I AM running again_.

And I'll likely be staring down a well-funded, left-leaning "Republican" challenger in the upcoming elections. I'm gearing up for a fight, not for my seat, but for the very soul of Idaho.

But I can't do it alone.

If you value your medical freedom, your right to choose how your children are educated, and your financial autonomy, then I need you in this fight with me. It's not hyperbole to say that your support now could be the difference between a free Idaho and a state shackled by creeping socialism and bureaucratic tyranny.

Are you ready to safeguard your family's future in Idaho?

Your contribution today is the firewall against the encroachment of freedoms we hold dear.

A contribution of [$1,000, $500, or even $50](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=1b6826d674&e=dea908e0fe "Contribute today") isn't just financial support— _**it's a battle cry, a declaration that you won't let Idaho fall into chaos.**_

So if you'd like, click below to contribute now and be a part of this crucial fight:

➡️ [Help Brian fight the Idaho swamp](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=fc2237234e&e=dea908e0fe "Help Brian fight the Idaho swamp")

Your involvement today writes the history of tomorrow.

Let's ensure it's one we're proud to tell.

With profound gratitude and urgency,

Brian

**P.S.**

I need you to act now, not just for me, but for the Idaho we love and want to preserve for our children and their children. Stand with me. Stand for our kids and families. Stand for Idaho. Stand for freedom.

[Contribute Now](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=48ca56ce2e&e=dea908e0fe "Contribute now")

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=974cca2253&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We’ve been campaigning at full tilt for some time now, and you’ve permitted me to share my vision with folks across this great state.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3713%2E5257348%2EZ3qx98)
Derek —
I wanted to set this moment aside to say _thank you._
You’ve answered the call at every deadline.
After every attack.
Preparing us for the many fights ahead.
_Thank you._
And when we asked you to help the victims of the terrible fires in Hawaii, you responded — with incredible generosity — and gave over $82,000!
We’ve been campaigning at full tilt for some time now, and you’ve permitted me to share my vision with folks across this great state.
For an economy that works for everyone. With affordable housing and quality health care.
For an environment that we can leave to our children and grandchildren.
For a democracy that will live on.
As we enter the final month of this FEC fundraising quarter, I will be leaning on you for help once again. We have lofty goals, and much work to do before our campaign makes it to the U.S. Senate chambers.
This is a defining moment in our nation’s history — and I know that together, we will rise to meet any challenge we face.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20230903_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3713%2E5257348%2EZ3qx98)

| | Patriot,

---
The amount of money the special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) are spending to try and defeat _OUR_ beautiful movement instead of Crooked Joe is utterly absurd.
---
By now, I’m sure you’re already aware of the $370 million that they’ve pledged to spend against us in the primary...

---
...But **_LEAKED_** reports now reveal that the RINOs’ chief Super PAC is plotting to add ***** **_ANOTHER* $50 MILLION THIS MONTH ALONE!_**

---
These cowards were even caught saying...

---
**_“_**** _Now let me tell you a secret — don’t leak this... We’re making a move now. We have to beat [Trump] and we’ve got to beat him in the next 60 days.”_**
---
How can any Republican spend hundreds of millions of dollars against their _own_ Party’s undisputed **FRONTRUNNER** leading by 50 and even 60 points?
---
_Not to mention these cowards just watched as Crooked Joe weaponized our country’s justice system to try and_** _JAIL_** _his leading opponent for LIFE like a Third World dictator._
---
_Well, here’s the TRUTH about them:_
---
_They don’t care at all about Republicans winning back the White House._
---
These special interest RINOs have made a fortune off selling out our country at __YOUR__ expense for decades!
---
And the only thing they really care about is preserving their uniparty globalist agenda – _and nothing more_.
---
Which is why they will go to unimaginable lengths to try and nominate their Deep State-approved puppet and **_HELP_** Crooked Joe remain in power, so long as it means the _ONLY_ candidate who puts AMERICA FIRST _(yours truly)_ never again steps foot in the White House.
---
_Patriot, these people are just as sick and twisted as Crooked Joe and his accomplices._
---
_**But, as we’ve already proven to be true, even their millions in dark money is no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION Americans giving just $1, $5, $10, even $24 alongside your fellow patriots.**_
---
And now, we need to show these RINOs that **_every time_** they attempt to **BUY** this nomination, our movement will stop them dead in their tracks.
---
Because every dollar they continue to waste attacking __us__ , is another dollar of life support given straight to Crooked Joe’s flailing campaign.
---
**[So please, make a contribution of even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to FIGHT BACK against the special interest RINOs’ plot and WRAP UP the primary ASAP so that we can shift 100% of our focus to the _REAL_ mission: firing Crooked Joe and SAVING AMERICA. ](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=dcddf7ecfd7440f39126242b8debe05d&_e=h5XTtlQjuUBLJ6a8rVn4p8kMJr2N5KWxAFKNG7VAtg5i_wQFbdGdCpMFK5zghrQz3F3hFa-wHpnVRLrazGjUx_6UahD57_fMRCx1VCX2f19GyckVy3FGlMqD-PBzwCRS8_MVACPnuRCaj0XBxKXxRptxh9cyCQwbkHL65itTSUQpgHz6JiX9pNGla5G5wICxeJVvNeiNI8iFeRSBp0SxTfQnKX_Chdy0vF7fTWUQRCnx6sXGvP7GZR5rADV1Kz2NRucvIjmhWj4A8GRctQ_LmaOg_fmFV5G7VWGTfAnB6U7akEYP3-zsEkgjAXK-NZxyrGZlU2WT_09OVosmpYaEm859l9Wth4LHaF87riFhYf3kDMV7MMs3aENf82MosdbDx6q073C22sx2HaUxO5qP9_pu9Lw-TdvVrbcgJRK_KLG1n3rES0DP45SW3i4TNj7Xr2223gqA0c0jvIKdXycY0KgsQsMAFrf_cuPmeUNA2Bw76ZJ1rBxMhTXQw2BcC6N4)**

clean_body: These RINOs will go to unimaginable lengths to try and destroy our movement. | | | | | Patriot, The amount of money the special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) are spending to try and defeat OUR beautiful movement instead of Crooked Joe is utterly absurd. By now, I’m sure you’re already aware of the $370 million that they’ve pledged to spend against us in the primary... ...But LEAKED reports now reveal that the RINOs’ chief Super PAC is plotting to add *** ANOTHER $50 MILLION THIS MONTH ALONE! These cowards were even caught saying... “ Now let me tell you a secret — don’t leak this... We’re making a move now. We have to beat [Trump] and we’ve got to beat him in the next 60 days.” How can any Republican spend hundreds of millions of dollars against their own Party’s undisputed FRONTRUNNER leading by 50 and even 60 points? Not to mention these cowards just watched as Crooked Joe weaponized our country’s justice system to try and JAIL his leading opponent for LIFE like a Third World dictator. Well, here’s the TRUTH about them: They don’t care at all about Republicans winning back the White House. These special interest RINOs have made a fortune off selling out our country at YOUR expense for decades! And the only thing they really care about is preserving their uniparty globalist agenda – and nothing more. Which is why they will go to unimaginable lengths to try and nominate their Deep State-approved puppet and HELP Crooked Joe remain in power, so long as it means the ONLY candidate who puts AMERICA FIRST (yours truly) never again steps foot in the White House. Patriot, these people are just as sick and twisted as Crooked Joe and his accomplices. But, as we’ve already proven to be true, even their millions in dark money is no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION Americans giving just $1, $5, $10, even $24 alongside your fellow patriots. And now, we need to show these RINOs that every time they attempt to BUY this nomination, our movement will stop them dead in their tracks. Because every dollar they continue to waste attacking us , is another dollar of life support given straight to Crooked Joe’s flailing campaign. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Big Pharma never gives up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
With President Biden’s announcement about Medicare negotiations, Big Pharma is getting straight to work
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)
This week the Biden Administration announced ten commonly used drugs that Medicare will now be able to negotiate the price of.
While this is great news for American taxpayers and patients, Big Pharma isn’t happy.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230903-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAL03_1_MED_20230903_V1_F&refcode2=29273_3422442_iCfVMQ&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)
Big Pharma is bringing lawsuits to courts across the country to try and curb Medicare’s ability to negotiate prices. And they’re continuing to mislead the public about what these negotiations mean. **One of their favorite myths to spread is that lowering costs will stifle research and development of new treatments.**
**I’ve proven the opposite is true.** Big Pharma companies are the ones who curb research when they purchase smaller, innovative firms and eliminate competition. The executives and big shareholders are the only ones who benefit from this.
I’ve held Big Pharma accountable since coming to Congress in 2019, and this year my bill to rein in their price-gouging took effect. But there’s so much more to be done and serious work to do to defend even the bit of progress we’ve made. **Pharmaceutical companies and most Members of Congress have a strong relationship—but I’m proud to be one of the very few who doesn’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Pharma CEOs.**
**[Can you make a contribution today to help send me to the U.S. Senate to continue holding these corporations accountable and lowering the cost of lifesaving prescriptions?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230903-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAL03_1_MED_20230903_V1_F&refcode2=29273_3422442_iCfVMQ&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230903-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAL03_1_MED_20230903_V1_F&refcode2=29273_3422442_iCfVMQ&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)
Thanks for your support,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL03_1_MED_20230903_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=29273_3422442_iCfVMQ&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=29273%2E3422442%2EiCfVMQ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
